jobs.title: GHG Auditor/Verifier
jobs.description:
Job Title: GHG Auditor/Verifier

Location: India - Bangalore, Remote / Hybrid

Employment Type: Fulltime

Department: Staff Augmentation

Reports To: VP - HR and Staff Augmentation

Role Overview

The Energy Audit Professional will be responsible for conducting independent assessments, audits, and assurance engagements across industrial, commercial, and residential energy and carbon reduction projects. The role involves evaluating compliance with relevant national and international standards, verifying energy savings and emission reductions, and providing assurance in alignment with recognized verification and validation frameworks.

The ideal candidate will possess a strong technical background in energy systems, carbon accounting, and audit methodologies, along with demonstrated expertise in ISAE 3000, ISO 14065:2020, and ISO/IEC 17029:2019 standards.

Key Responsibilities

Audit and Verification:
• Plan, conduct, and report on audits and assurance engagements in accordance with ISAE 3000 and related assurance standards.
• Evaluate projects for compliance with ISO 14065:2020 and ISO/IEC 17029:2019 requirements for greenhouse gas validation and verification bodies.
• Review, verify, and validate data, methodologies, and results for energy efficiency, carbon reduction, and carbon removal projects.

Technical Evaluation:

Audit industrial and residential energy reduction and carbon removal projects, including but not limited to:
• Energy Efficiency: Lighting, heat pumps, household appliances, building systems.
• Fuel Switching: Evaluation of energy source transitions and emission impacts.
• Renewable Energy: Solar PV, battery storage, and hybrid systems.
• Carbon Removal: Biochar, biomass burial, BECCS, and related technologies.

Standards and Compliance:

Conduct assurance engagements across recognized domestic and international standards and schemes such as:
• Australian Programs: NSW Energy Saving Scheme, Victorian Energy Upgrade Scheme.
• International Programs: Verra, Gold Standard, CDM, , Isometric, and other emerging carbon removal frameworks.
• Ensure all audit work aligns with quality, independence, and ethical standards as defined under ISAE 3000 and ISO 14065 frameworks.

Reporting and Documentation:
• Prepare detailed audit reports and assurance statements with clear findings and recommendations.
• Maintain robust documentation, evidence records, and audit trails consistent with accreditation requirements.

Continuous Improvement:
• Stay up to date with evolving methodologies, standards, and policies in the energy and carbon sectors.
• Contribute to process improvements and internal quality assurance programs.

Qualifications and Experience

Essential:
• Degree in Engineering, Environmental Science, Energy Management, or related field.
• Demonstrated knowledge and application of:
• ISAE 3000 Assurance Engagements Other than Audits or Reviews of Historical Financial Information.
• ISO 14065:2020 Greenhouse gases: Requirements for greenhouse gas validation and verification bodies.
• ISO/IEC 17029:2019 Conformity assessment: General principles and requirements for validation and verification bodies.
• Proven experience auditing energy efficiency, renewable energy, and carbon reduction/removal projects.
• Strong analytical, documentation, and communication skills.

Preferred:
• Experience providing assurance against national and international frameworks, including:
• NSW Energy Saving Scheme
• Victorian Energy Upgrade Scheme
• Verra, Gold Standard, CDM, , Isometric, or similar.
• Accreditation or training in energy auditing, GHG verification, or sustainability assurance.
• Professional certifications such as CEA (Certified Energy Auditor), CMVP, or Lead Auditor qualifications in ISO standards (e.g., ISO 14064, ISO

Key Competencies
• Technical proficiency in energy systems and carbon accounting.
• Strong understanding of audit and assurance methodologies.
• High attention to detail, independence, and ethical integrity.
• Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
• Ability to manage multiple assignments and deadlines.

jobs.title: Senior auditor
jobs.description:
Company Overview Elevate LLC is a national platform built to partner with growth-focused accounting, tax and advisory firms. Our mission is to empower entrepreneurial firms and their leaders by providing the capital, operational support, and strategic guidance they need to scale. By combining the resources of a larger organization with the independence and culture of local firms, Elevate creates an environment where professionals can focus on serving clients, developing talent, and innovating across accounting, tax, and advisory services.
Our partner firms benefit from Elevate’s shared services, technology investments, and growth expertise. Backed by experienced leadership and long-term capital, we are building a next-generation professional services platform that redefines how CPA firms grow, compete, and thrive in today’s market.
About Your Role We are seeking a highly motivated Associate – Audit to join our Audit Team. In this role, you will be responsible for supporting the execution of financial audits for private companies, contributing to the delivery of high-quality assurance, regulatory compliance, and enhanced client confidence.
This opportunity is ideal for individuals with a strong foundation in audit practices, a commitment to financial integrity, and a passion for working in a dynamic, fast-paced environment that values cross-border collaboration, innovation, and continuous professional growth.
The successful candidate will be analytical, meticulous, proactive, and a collaborative team player—someone who demonstrates initiative, thrives in a performance-driven culture, and is dedicated to upholding the highest standards of excellence.
Key Responsibilities
Perform audit procedures on WIP (Work-in-Progress) schedules, job cost reports, and A/R aging tied to business contracts.
Assist in testing percentage-of-completion revenue recognition and related cutoff and accuracy assertions.
Review and reconcile AIA G702/703 forms, subcontractor payment certificates, and retainage balances.
Analyze job profitability trends and detect anomalies across active projects.
Execute procedures on indirect cost allocations, change orders, and bonded project tracking.
Support engagement teams with risk assessment documentation, walkthroughs, and internal control testing relevant to job cost cycles.
Document audit findings and prepare supporting schedules in accordance with U. S. GAAS and GAAP.
Required Qualifications & Experience Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Commerce.
CPA or pursuing preferred Experience: 3-5 years of U. S. assurance/audit experience Essential Technical Skills: Proficient with Case Ware, CCH Engagement, or similar audit software . Knowledge of GAAP revenue recognition (ASC 606) and job costing fundamentals is highly desirable. Attention to detail, ability to interpret financial data, and apply audit standards effectively
Exceptional proficiency in written and verbal English communication, enabling clear and effective collaboration with U. S.-based teams and stakeholders.
Proven ability to work independently, prioritize tasks efficiently, and adhere strictly to deadlines.
Preferred but not mandatory skills or experiences: Experience working with international audit teams, particularly U. S. clients
Benefits & Perks Health Insurance for you and your dependents including parents Provident Fund Leave Policy - PTO Paid Holidays per Calendar Year
Job Details Title : Associate/Senior Associate - Audit Annual Compensation: Competitive Work Model : Remote Nature : Full time Shift : 3 PM to 12 AM

IaaS et PaaS.

Job Description

Roles and Responsibilities:
• Lead and perform data privacy assessments for systems managing personally identifiable information.
• Evaluate the design and operational effectiveness of privacy / security controls by partnering with control owners and stakeholders.
• Identify control deficiencies, support remediation efforts through resolution, and report non-conformances in a timely manner.
• Prepare and deliver comprehensive summary reports for each data privacy / security assessment or review.
• Align all activities with the Unified Control Framework (UCF) to maintain consistency and compliance across processes.
• Maintain clear and proactive communication with application teams regarding assessment scope, expectations, and timelines.
• Drive initiatives to improve processes and enhance efficiency through automation and streamlined controls.
• Educate project teams on privacy regulations and related IT control requirements to promote awareness and ensure regulatory compliance.
• Establish operating rhythm to report out on key metrics including status of assessments and issue management.
• Ensure audit readiness, provide audit support, and manage audit-related activities to facilitate successful outcomes.

Qualifications & Skills:
• Bachelor’s degree in information security, Computer Science, Information Technology, Law, or a related field.
• Some years of experience in data privacy, information security, IT audit, compliance, or risk management.
• Strong knowledge of global data privacy laws and frameworks (e.g., GDPR, LGPD, DPDP) and U.S. health data regulations (HIPAA).
• Solid understanding of the concept of personally identifiable information (PII) and its protection requirements.
• Familiarity with IT security concepts, IT controls: including access management, infrastructure, encryption, and cybersecurity practices.
• Ability to identify appropriate testing procedures and assess the effectiveness of technology and privacy controls.
• Strong communication skills with the ability to explain complex issues to both technical and non-technical audiences, including engineering, legal, and project teams, focusing on risk and impact.
• Critical thinking and analytical skills to interpret data, identify trends, and assess privacy risks.
• Self-driven with the ability to independently plan and manage assessment schedules.
• Proficiency in English, both written and verbal.

Desired Characteristics
• Internationally recognized information security/information system audit certification/qualifications such as CISA, CISM, CISSP or CIA (IAPP)
• Experience with GRC tools (e.g., Archer, ServiceNow GRC).
• Experience conducting risk assessments, identifying gaps, and recommending mitigation strategies.
• Experience supporting audits and managing audit readiness activities.

Pay Range

For Poland based positions, Annual Salary Range: 213 680,00 PLN - 293 810,00 PLN

Placement Within This Range Depends On
• Relevant skills and qualifications
• Prior job-related experience
• Internal equity considerations (alignment with colleagues in similar roles) e.t.c.

We review pay ranges regularly to ensure they remain competitive with the external market and align with our internal equity considerations.

Benefits & Rewards

In addition to base salary, our employees have access to a comprehensive package of benefits and allowances, which may include:
• Health & wellness coverage
• Retirement and or savings plans
• Allowances or benefits to support role requirements (e.g., mobility, transport, or role-specific needs such as a company car or allowance where applicable)
• Work-life balance support (e.g., flexible working, leave programs)
• Recognition and incentive programs aligned with performance and company success

The exact benefits package depends on the role, location, and employment terms as specified in the Colleague Value Proposition document that will be shared prior to the interview or at the offer discussion stage.
• Performance Bonus: Details to be shared during offer discussions

Additional Information

Relocation Assistance Provided: No

jobs.title: Quality Auditor - Radiology and Cardiology Medical Claims
jobs.description:
Job Summary

Progressive Technology is seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Quality Auditor to join our team. The successful candidate will be responsible for reviewing and auditing medical claims related to radiology and cardiology services. This role is crucial in ensuring that claims are processed accurately and in compliance with all relevant regulations and industry standards. The Quality Auditor will work closely with other teams to maintain high-quality standards and resolve any discrepancies in claims. This is an excellent opportunity for an experienced professional looking to grow their career in the healthcare industry.
Key Responsibilities
• *

Perform thorough audits on radiology and cardiology medical claims, ensuring that they meet industry standards and comply with both internal and external regulations.
• *

Identify, investigate, and resolve discrepancies in medical claims, ensuring timely resolution and documentation.
• *

Ensure accuracy and completeness in claims processing, verifying that all necessary documentation is included and accurate.
• *

Collaborate with claims processors, billing departments, and medical professionals to clarify any issues with claims.
• *

Maintain up-to-date knowledge of medical coding, insurance regulations, and healthcare policies to ensure compliance.
• *

Provide feedback and recommendations for process improvements to ensure more efficient claims processing.
• *

Prepare detailed audit reports summarizing findings, discrepancies, and corrective actions taken.
• *

Ensure that all audits are completed in a timely manner, in accordance with departmental guidelines.
• *

Assist in training and mentoring new auditors and other team members as needed.
• Required Skills and Qualifications
• *

Bachelors degree in Healthcare Administration, Health Information Management, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
• *

Strong knowledge of medical coding systems (ICD-10, CPT, HCPCS).
• *

In-depth understanding of radiology and cardiology medical claims and procedures.
• *

Familiarity with healthcare insurance, payer policies, and reimbursement processes.
• *

Proficiency in auditing and claims processing software.
• *

Excellent analytical skills and attention to detail.
• *

Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to explain complex information to non-experts.
• *

Ability to work independently, manage time effectively, and meet deadlines.
• *

Ability to collaborate and work well with cross-functional teams.
• Experience
• *

Minimum of 3 years of experience in medical claims auditing, preferably with a focus on radiology and cardiology.
• *

Experience working with healthcare providers, insurance companies, and medical coding professionals.
• *

Proven track record of identifying and resolving discrepancies in medical claims.
• *

Experience with regulatory compliance and knowledge of federal and state healthcare regulations.
• Working Hours
• *

Full-time position
• *

Standard working hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
• *

Occasional overtime may be required during peak periods.
• Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities
• *

Strong understanding of medical terminology, particularly in the areas of radiology and cardiology.
• *

Expertise in medical claims processing, auditing, and regulatory compliance.
• *

Ability to handle sensitive information with discretion and maintain confidentiality.
• *

Proficiency in using auditing tools, databases, and claims processing software.
• *

Ability to think critically and solve complex problems efficiently.
• *

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.
• *

Knowledge of healthcare reimbursement models and payer-provider interactions.
• Benefits
• *

Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.
• *

Comprehensive health benefits package (medical, dental, vision).
• *

Retirement savings plan with company match.
• *

Paid time off (PTO) and holiday pay.
• *

Professional development opportunities and training programs.
• *

Flexible work arrangements, including remote work options.
• *

Employee wellness programs and support for work-life balance.
• *

Access to industry events and conferences.
• Why Join Progressive Technology?

At Progressive Technology, we value the contributions of our employees and strive to create a supportive, innovative, and inclusive work environment. As a leader in the healthcare technology sector, we are committed to driving excellence in everything we do. By joining our team, you will be part of a dynamic company that provides opportunities for growth, development, and career advancement. We offer competitive salaries, a comprehensive benefits package, and a culture that values your expertise.
How to Apply

If you are passionate about healthcare quality and have the skills and experience to succeed in this role, we encourage you to apply! Please submit your resume and cover letter via our career portal on the Progressive Technology website. In your cover letter, be sure to highlight your experience with radiology and cardiology medical claims, as well as any relevant certifications. Our hiring team will review your application and contact you if your qualifications match our needs.

jobs.description:

Progressive Technology is seeking a highly detail-oriented and experienced Medical Biller/Quality Auditor - Radiology Specialist to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of radiology billing practices, coding accuracy, and regulatory compliance. This dual-role position involves both medical billing and auditing responsibilities, ensuring precise and compliant processing of radiology claims. You will play a critical role in supporting our mission to deliver high-quality healthcare revenue cycle management services.
Key Responsibilities:

Accurately review and process radiology billing claims in accordance with payer guidelines and regulations.
• *

Audit radiology reports, claims, and supporting documentation to ensure coding and billing accuracy.

Verify and analyze CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS codes to ensure proper reimbursement and reduce denials.
• *

Collaborate with radiologists and other healthcare professionals to clarify documentation and support correct billing.
• *

Identify and report patterns or trends that may indicate revenue leakage or compliance issues.

Educate and guide internal billing teams on radiology coding updates and documentation requirements.

Deep understanding of radiology terminology, procedures, and documentation.

Strong knowledge of coding systems (CPT, ICD-10, HCPCS).

Excellent attention to detail and analytical skills.

High level of integrity, confidentiality, and professional ethics.
• *

Strong written and verbal communication skills.
• *

Proficiency with EHR/EMR systems and billing software.
• *

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a remote setting.

Minimum of 3 years of medical billing experience, with at least 2 years specifically in radiology.
• *

Previous experience in a quality auditing or compliance role is highly desirable.

Experience working with multiple payers, including Medicare and Medicaid, is a plus.

Full-time, 40 hours per week

Remote work option available after successful onboarding

Ability to work cross-functionally with billing, coding, and clinical teams

Proficiency in MS Office Suite, especially Excel and Word

Strong organizational and problem-solving skills

401(k) with company match

Paid time off and paid holidays

Ongoing professional development and training

Employee wellness programs

Career advancement opportunities
• Why Join Progressive Technology?

At Progressive Technology, we are committed to excellence, innovation, and integrity in every aspect of our work. As part of our team, you will be supported by a collaborative work environment and have access to state-of-the-art tools and continuous learning opportunities. We value the expertise of our employees and offer a culture where your contributions are recognized and your growth is encouraged. Be part of a team that is making a difference in the future of healthcare billing and auditing.
How to Apply:

Interested candidates are encouraged to submit a resume and a brief cover letter outlining their experience and suitability for the role to us. Please include Medical Biller/Quality Auditor - Radiology Specialist in the subject line.

jobs.title: Business Development Executive (Digital Marketing Services) – Remote
jobs.description:
#############################

Important Notes (Please Read Before Applying):
1. We are specifically looking for candidates who have worked as full-time employees for the majority of their professional career. If your background is primarily in freelancing or part-time roles, we respectfully ask that you refrain from applying for this position.

2. Some candidates may misunderstand the nature of this role. To clarify, this position focuses on generating leads through organic or low-cost strategies—such as SEO, social media outreach, cold emailing, and LinkedIn engagement. It does not involve managing paid advertising campaigns on platforms like Google Ads, Meta (Facebook) Ads, or LinkedIn Ads. If your primary experience in lead generation revolves around paid media or advertising platforms, we kindly ask that you refrain from applying for this role.

#############################

About the Hiring Company:

We are hiring on behalf of a results-driven Digital Marketing and Web Development Agency offering end-to-end services including Website Design, Development, Social Media Marketing, PPC Campaign Management, and Online Advertising. The company is expanding its outreach in the Indian market and is seeking a talented Business Development Executive to support their client acquisition efforts.

This is an excellent opportunity to work with a skilled digital team, contribute directly to business growth, and build your long-term career with a future-focused agency.

Role Overview:

As a Business Development Executive, your core responsibility will be to identify, qualify, and connect with potential Indian clients in need of digital services. You’ll be researching, reaching out, and engaging with prospects to create opportunities for the sales and business development team.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Research and build prospect lists of businesses that need:
• Website design and development (including WordPress projects)
• Social media management and marketing (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn)
• PPC/Online ad services (Google Ads, Meta Ads)

2. Engage prospects through outreach via email, messaging, and occasional follow-up calls.
3. Maintain organized lead records using CRM tools or spreadsheets.
4. Schedule meetings or demos between warm leads and the internal sales team.
5. Meet weekly and monthly lead generation targets.
6. Report regularly on lead progress and campaign effectiveness.

Requirements:
• Minimum 1 year of experience in a similar role (preferably for a digital agency or marketing company).
• Strong understanding of digital services (web design, PPC, online ads, social media marketing).
• Hands-on experience using tools such as LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Google Sheets, Apollo/Hunter, etc.
• Good spoken and written English.
• Ability to work independently and meet KPIs consistently.
• Must be willing to use a third-party time tracking tool (mandatory).
• 6-month minimum commitment is required.
• Candidate must successfully complete a short assignment to demonstrate relevant skills.

Preferred Skills (Nice to Have):
• Familiarity with CRM tools like Zoho, HubSpot, or similar.
• Previous experience with platforms like Upwork, Freelancer, or B2B marketplaces.
• Understanding of how digital agencies pitch and close clients.

Job Perks & Work Conditions:
• Remote work with flexible working hours (timing is negotiable).
• Competitive monthly compensation (based on experience).
• Bonus potential based on performance and lead quality.
• Long-term opportunity with a reputable digital agency.
• Work on meaningful projects across various industries.

Application Process:
Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a task-based assignment to evaluate real-world lead generation skills. Please share your updated resume and samples or proof of past work.

Job Type: Full-Time (Remote)
Minimum Experience Required: 1 Year
Location: India (Remote)
Recruiting On Behalf Of: A fast-growing Digital Marketing & Web Agency
Contract Duration: Minimum 6 Months (Mandatory)

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: ₹18,000.00 - ₹25,000.00 per month

Benefits:
• Flexible schedule

Application Question(s):
• Have you previously done lead generation or business development for digital services (like website development, SEO, paid ads management, and social media management) using organic or low-cost channels such as email marketing, LinkedIn outreach, or social media messaging—without relying on paid advertising platforms like Google Ads or Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Ads?
• Have you previously done lead generation or business development for any business/service other than digital services using organic or low-cost channels such as email marketing, LinkedIn outreach, or social media messaging—without relying on paid advertising platforms like Google Ads or Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Ads?
• Are you currently working at a company or engaged in any other professional activities?

If yes, could you kindly share details about your current role?
Also, when would you be available to transition and start with us?

Education:
• Bachelor's (Preferred)

Experience:
• Linkedin Outreach: 1 year (Preferred)
• Email Outreach: 1 year (Preferred)
• Social Media Outreach: 1 year (Preferred)
• Business development: 1 year (Preferred)
• Lead generation: 1 year (Preferred)

Language:
• English (Preferred)
• Hindi (Preferred)

jobs.title: Marketing(Founder's office)
jobs.description:
About the Programme -

Jasoneth Academy is an education company that creates and delivers high-impact personal transformation programmes.

The programmes are rooted in the principles of psychology, high-performance research, management science, spirituality, and mysticism.

Jasoneth Academy believes that human life is meant to be lived fully. Its mission is to empower individuals to be truly alive and to live aligned and successful lives (as defined and accepted by the self).

Phase 1 - Human Wellbeing

Human Wellbeing: Niche personal development programmes designed to empower individuals psychologically, spiritually, and emotionally.

List of offerings in existence and in the pipeline:

- AAGAS (for aligned goal accomplishment across life categories )

- Aligned execution for entrepreneurs across industries with annual revenue of $1M+

- Custom training solutions for institutions to increase project execution speed and impact by working on collective team beliefs and "why" anchoring.

Phase 2 (Micro variant A) - Micro Worlds Built by "Well Humans"

The Startup School of Jasoneth Academy intends to empower existing and aspiring entrepreneurs to build enterprises that are truly aligned with their core and make them come alive every minute of their existence.

Phase 2 (Micro variant B) Digitise and Augment existing core with tech.

Fully digitize the existing offerings and integrate them with the existing curriculum of schools, colleges, and for-profit and not-for-profit institutions.

Phase 3 - The World

Hundreds of micro-institutions and think tanks that positively alter the trajectory of known civilizations.

Where are we at right now?

Phase 1

When do we intend to get to Phase 2?

Not before 9 months

When do we get to Phase 3?

Not before 18 months

Culture

More often than not, culture is an extrapolation of the “being” and execution style of the founders and the first recruits of the organization. That being said, here are the key components:

- Clear thinking and goals.

- Rapid, flow-like execution.

- Empathy towards every stakeholder (employees, customers, partners).

- Enjoy work, enjoy life; be a blessing to self and humanity.

What are the expectations for the role?

1. Marketing and Sales

- Build the marketing and sales functions of the organization from scratch by working with the founder.

- Assume responsibility for marketing operations and sales operations.

- Think marketing and sales funnels, Meta Ads, and copywriting.

- Tech-savviness: You don’t necessarily have to know how to write code, but you should be tech-savvy enough to work with various technical tools (building funnels, running ads, etc.).

- Clear thinking.

- Be willing and interested in understanding how the algorithms of platforms (YouTube, Meta, Instagram) work (almost absolutely non-technical).

- Test ad copies, funnels, video sales letters, and landing pages to increase conversions and thereby impact.

- Create Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for all marketing activities.

> Note: There might be a 30% addition or subtraction to the role as defined.

Service Delivery

- Ensure that clients get results by ensuring smooth delivery of programmes through collaboration with the training team.

- Create SOPs for service delivery.

- Slight deviation from the primary JD when required.

Key Qualities

- Intellectual curiosity

- Knows how to enjoy working

- Knows how to chill

- Gets stuff done

- Problem-solving (and problem curation)

- Bias to action

Growth Trajectory

Learnings and Responsbilities.

You get to build an entire marketing and sales function from scratch and learn everything there is to learn in the space by building it.

- First 3 days: Get familiar with funnels, landing pages, copywriting, and service offerings,

- Going forward: Get stuff done.
• We can always figure out how to have more members in the team and do bigger things, clock higher revenue, impact more lives. But for now, let's nail this phase.

Pay

If you are doing well(and I will do everything in my capactity to enable you to do well), I am absolutely comfortable revising the pay structure every 4 months or earlier.

Work Environment

For the first 3–4 months, it’s going to have absolute bootrstrapped startup vibes. Do we have to work a lot? Probably yes. Do we have to get burnt out? If that’s the case, what’s the point of working? Are we going to have a lot of fun while working? What’s the point if we don’t enjoy what we do and create a positive impact in the world while doing it?

Working days?

Let’s talk about it. The idea is to get stuff done. fast. and have a good time doing it.

Do I have to be prepared for the interview?

What do you think?

Location?

Sainikpuri, Secunderabad (Hyderabad)

On-site or remote?

Primarily On-site. *Resedential option is available.

But Jaswanth, don't you think we are under-utilizing tech at the moment?

Not really. But anyways, down the ladder, let’s take the essence of what we are building and fuse it with tech and a couple of other elements for faster reach, scale, and growth.

One step at a time.

jobs.title: Marketing Finance - MX Player, Advertising Finance India
jobs.description:
DESCRIPTION

Job Description
Amazon MX Player seeks a Senior Financial Analyst for the Marketing Finance role in the Finance Team. As one of India's leading OTT platforms, Amazon MX Player has rapidly grown its content library and user base, offering premium scripted series, movies, and original content. This is an exciting opportunity for a candidate who wants to work in a fast-paced media business, is passionate about digital streaming and content strategy, and is interested in directly supporting marketing initiatives that drive customer acquisition and engagement.

The successful candidate will be analytical in approach and have an ability to drive financial insights that inform marketing investment decisions. This role requires a self-starter who has keen attention to detail, ability to work in a fast-paced environment, and be a strategic advisor to marketing and business leaders. The candidate must have the aptitude to incorporate new approaches and methodologies and be able to develop and define key business questions around marketing ROI, customer acquisition costs, and content performance metrics. This role also has regular interaction with Marketing, Content, Product, and Finance teams across Amazon and requires good interpersonal and communication skills.

Key job responsibilities
Key Job Responsibilities
• Partner with Marketing team to develop annual marketing budgets and quarterly forecasts aligned to business growth objectives
• Create and implement marketing ROI models and customer acquisition cost frameworks to optimize marketing spend efficiency
• Financial Planning & Analysis for marketing campaigns, including pre-launch projections and post-campaign performance analysis
• Develop financial models to evaluate content marketing strategies and their impact on viewership and engagement metrics
• Drive automation of marketing finance reporting through collaboration with BI and analytics teams
• Conduct competitive benchmarking analysis on marketing spend efficiency across streaming platforms
• Support business case development for new marketing channels and partnership opportunities

Basic qualifications
• 3+ years of finance experience
• Bachelor's degree in finance, accounting, business, economics, or a related analytical field

Preferred qualifications
• CA or MBA,
• 4+ years of business finance experience
• Experience working with large-scale data mining and reporting tools (examples: SQL, Cognos) and other financial systems (example: Oracle)

BASIC QUALIFICATIONS
• 3+ years of tax, finance or a related analytical field experience
• 4+ years of applying key financial performance indicators (KPIs) to analyses experience
• 4+ years of creating process improvements with automation and analysis experience
• 4+ years of identifying, leading, and executing opportunities to improve, automate, standardize or simplify finance or business tools and processes experience
• Experience with advanced use of SQL for data mining and business intelligence

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• 4+ years of participating in continuous improvement projects in your team to scale and improve controllership with measurable results experience
• MBA, or CFA
• Knowledge of Tableau

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

jobs.description:
Job Title: Sales Representative

Department: Sales

Location: Siliguri

Job Summary:

The Sales Representative is responsible for promoting and selling Rooms to potential and existing customers. This role involves identifying and contacting prospects, delivering persuasive sales presentations, and maintaining strong customer relationships to achieve sales targets.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Customer Acquisition:

- Identify and research potential customers through various methods, including cold calling, networking, and referrals.

- Generate and qualify leads to build a robust customer pipeline.

2. Sales Presentations:

- Conduct effective sales presentations to prospects, showcasing the features and benefits of [company's products/services].

- Address customer questions and objections, providing accurate information to help them make informed decisions.

3. Negotiation and Closing:

- Negotiate terms, pricing, and contract agreements with customers to secure sales.

- Close deals and process sales orders in accordance with company policies.

4. Relationship Management:

- Build and maintain strong relationships with existing customers, ensuring their needs are met and addressing any concerns.

- Promote upselling and cross-selling opportunities to maximize customer value.

5. Sales Targets:

- Meet or exceed monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets as defined by the company.

6. Market Research:

- Stay informed about industry trends, market dynamics, and competitor activities.

- Use market insights to refine sales strategies and approaches.

7. Documentation:

- Maintain accurate records of all sales activities, including customer interactions, contracts, and sales reports.

8. Collaboration:

- Work collaboratively with other departments, including marketing, customer support, and product development, to ensure a seamless customer experience.

Qualifications and Skills:

- High school diploma or equivalent; Bachelor's degree in Hospitality preferred.

- Min 1 years Proven experience in sales or a related role, with a track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets and must be from travel industry.

- Strong communication skills, both verbal and written.

- Excellent negotiation and persuasion skills.

- Self-motivated and goal-oriented.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

- Proficient in using CRM software and other sales tools.

- Adaptability to changing market conditions and customer needs.

- Time management and organization skills

jobs.title: Ecommerce Growth Operator – Email, CRO, Remarketing
jobs.description:
We operate a portfolio of automotive ecommerce brands (AutoBuffy, Westar Auto, RC Auto, Premium Shocks) selling across eBay, Amazon, and direct-to-consumer platforms.

We are looking for a hands-on Ecommerce Growth & Retention Specialist to help increase repeat purchase rate, improve conversion rate, and build a strong lifecycle marketing engine.
This role is execution-heavy. You will not just "create strategy" — you will build, launch, test, and optimize campaigns.

You will work directly with our technical lead to identify growth opportunities, propose improvements, and implement revenue-generating systems.

⸻

Your Core Mission

Increase customer lifetime value and drive repeat revenue across multiple brands.

⸻

Responsibilities
• Build and manage email marketing campaigns (Klaviyo or similar)

Create automated flows:
• Abandoned cart
• Post-purchase upsell
• Winback campaigns
• Review requests
• Cross-sell flows
• Segment customer lists by purchase history and behavior
• Set up and optimize Meta & Google remarketing campaigns
• Analyze site performance and identify conversion leaks
• Propose CRO improvements (landing pages, checkout, trust elements)
• Monitor weekly KPIs and report revenue impact
• Coordinate with tech to implement improvements
⸻

What We Are NOT Looking For
• A social-media-only marketer
• Someone focused on vanity metrics (likes, followers)
• A strategist who does not execute
We want someone obsessed with revenue, retention, and measurable results.

⸻

Success Metrics
• Increase repeat purchase rate
• Increase email-attributed revenue
• Improve conversion rate
• Improve LTV
• Lower CAC dependency
Contract duration of more than 6 months. with 40 hours per week.

Mandatory skills:
Marketing Strategy, Google Ads, Conversion Rate Optimization, Email Marketing, Google Analytics 4, Klaviyo, Google Analytics, Customer Retention, Advertising Strategy

jobs.title: Senior Google Ads Strategist, DTC Supplements, Competitive Market
jobs.description:
We run a premium DTC supplement brand in the male testosterone support category.

Our product is already performing well on Amazon with strong reviews and steady monthly sales. The product converts. Our challenge is building a profitable paid acquisition engine outside of Amazon.

We recently launched Google Ads and saw very poor results. CPCs are high, competition is aggressive, and the niche is saturated with large-budget brands. 

We are not looking for a general PPC manager.


We are looking for a strategic Google Ads specialist who has direct experience running paid search in supplements or similarly competitive DTC health niches.

If you have never worked in supplements or high-CPC health categories, this role is not a fit.


What we need:

 Deep experience with Google Search and Shopping in competitive verticals Funnel thinking, not just traffic buying Experience optimizing landing pages and improving conversion rates Understanding of subscription-based LTV modelsContract duration of more than 6 months. with 40 hours per week.


Mandatory skills:
 Google Ads

jobs.title: Sr Digital Finfit (CFP)
jobs.description:
Job Description

Job Title: Senior Financial Planning Specialist / Financial Planning Expert (Digital) Reporting

To: Branch Manager/CEO

About Finnovate: Finnovate is a holistic financial planning and wealth advisory platform. We are passionate about transforming the way Indians get personal finance advice. Our team is dedicated to providing comprehensive financial solutions that cater to the unique needs of our clients.

Location: Mumbai

Employment Type: Full time Key Responsibilities:

 Acquire new clients by identifying prospects, conducting financial need assessments, and presenting financial planning and investment solutions as per standards. Build and nurture strong client relationships by understanding financial goals and delivering customized wealth solutions. Advise individuals on informed financial decisions to support long-term financial security and growth. Deliver expert guidance on financial planning, investment strategies, and comprehensive wealth management aligned to client needs. Remain updated on market trends, regulatory developments, and industry best practices to provide timely and relevant advice. Evaluate financial data, monitor client portfolios, and refine financial plans to enhance outcomes. Represent Finnovate at conferences, client meetings, and industry forums to promote financial literacy and brand visibility. Own and drive branch-level revenue targets, ensuring consistent achievement of business goals. Analyze sales performance, lead conversion metrics, product effectiveness, and client behavior to identify growth opportunities and improve productivity. Prepare, review, and present performance reports, dashboards, and business forecasts for management decision-making. Lead, coach, and motivate the internal sales team and channel partners to achieve high performance and accountability. Oversee smooth day-to-day branch operations while ensuring adherence to internal policies and regulatory requirements.

Qualification & Skills

 Bachelor’s degree in finance, economics, or a related field CFP certification is preferred Should have a NISM XA – XB qualification Minimum of 8 years of experience in financial advisory or related fields Strong knowledge of financial planning, investment strategies, and wealth management. Excellent stakeholder management skills, superior communication and interpersonal skills to educate and engage clients. Analytical mindset with the ability to assess financial data and provide strategic recommendations. Self-driven, goal-oriented, and passionate about helping others achieve financial success.

Years of Experience: 8 years of relevant experience preferred.

Benefits On Being a Part Of Finnovate

✓ Health Insurance: Coverage including options for dependents.

✓ Paid Time off: Vacation days and holidays, allowing employees to take time off while still receiving pay.

✓ Parental Leave: Paid time off for new parents, including maternity, paternity, and adoption leave.

✓ Professional Development: Opportunities for training, workshops, conferences to support employees' career growth.

✓ Recognition and Incentives: Performance-based variable pay or recognition programs to reward employees for their contributions.

✓ Company Events and Celebrations: Company outings, team- building activities for bonding between team members

✓ Employee Recognition Programs: Awards, incentives, or bonuses for outstanding performance or tenure.

✓ Employee Referral Programs: Bonuses or incentives for referring qualified candidates who are hired by the company.

jobs.title: Human Resources Coordinator
jobs.description:
Overview

The HR Coordinator will provide comprehensive administrative and operational support to the HR team. This role is critical in ensuring smooth execution of HR processes, tracking deliverables, and supporting multiple HR projects. The ideal candidate will have strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a structured manner.

Responsibilities

Transactional & Administrative Support
• Assist HR teams with day-to-day administrative tasks and documentation.
• Prepare and maintain HR records, reports, and trackers.

Coordination & Follow-ups
• Track agreed tasks and ensure timely closures with relevant teams and individuals.
• Send reminders and follow up on pending actions across HR functions.

Specific Activities
• New Hire Onboarding: Coordinate onboarding activities, ensure completion of checklists, and liaise with stakeholders for a smooth experience. Manage the onboarding orientation including the identification and allocation of speakers, run new hire check-ins as may be defined from time to time.
• Offboarding process: Support all concerned HR teams on offboarding related process and inputs.
• Database Updates & Accuracy: Work with HRBPs and HR Services to perform monthly HR employee database validations, identify and resolve defects. Work with HRBPs for timely preparation of inputs for any HR database changes.
• Periodic Meetings: Schedule and coordinate meetings with key stakeholders for the HR Head, including agenda preparation and follow-ups.
• Focus Group Discussions: Identify and confirm participants for HRBP-led focus group discussions. Organize the meetings, document the feedback/actions and track closures with respective teams within and outside HR.
• Engagement Survey Action Planning: Follow up on periodic activities and ensure timely implementation of agreed actions.
• Compliance Activities: Run checklists for compliance-related tasks across teams and track completion.
• Process Audits: Conduct basic audits of HR processes to ensure adherence to standards and highlight gaps. Support HR team in collating responses for on-going audit queries, creating and maintaining a tracker of all audit related action points and tracking before time closure with proper review, approvals and documentation.

Data Analysis & Reporting
• Collect, organize, and analyse basic HR data (., headcount, attrition, engagement scores).
• Prepare basic dashboards and summary reports for leadership review.

Project Coordination
• Support HR projects by managing timelines, deliverables, and communication.
• Coordinate with internal stakeholders to ensure smooth execution of initiatives.

Qualifications

Qualifications & Skills
• Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
• 1–3 years of experience in HR coordination or administrative roles (preferred).
• Strong communication skills (verbal and written).
• Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word); familiarity with HR systems is a plus.
• Ability to manage multiple tasks/projects with attention to detail and deadlines.
• Structured and organized approach to work with problem-solving mindset.

Key Competencies
• Organizational Skills: Ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks efficiently.
• Analytical Thinking: Comfortable working with data and generating insights.
• Collaboration: Works well with diverse teams and builds strong relationships.
• Proactive Approach: Takes initiative to follow up and ensure task completion.

What do we offer

jobs.title: HRBP & Labour relations specialist
jobs.description:
wherewework.bg on behalf of:

Just Eat Takeaway.com

Ready for a challenge?

Then Just Eat Takeaway.com might be the place for you. We’re a leading global online delivery platform, and our vision is to empower everyday convenience.

Whether it’s a Friday-night feast, a post-gym poke bowl, or grabbing some groceries, our tech platform connects tens of millions of customers with hundreds of thousands of restaurant, grocery and convenience partners across the globe.

About this role:

We are looking for a highly skilled and strategic professional to join our team as HR Business Partner and Labour relations specialist. You will play a vital role in driving HR and labour relations initiatives and ensuring the alignment of the overall HR strategy with the specific needs of the country and local stakeholders. You will act as a key HR partner to the country management team and work collaboratively to embed the HR strategy. Next to that, you will engage with external stakeholders, driving negotiations and where relevant represent the company with our social partners.

These are some of the key ingredients to the role:

Strategic Business Partner
• Partner with the Country MT and/or Senior Management teams to co-create and drive the people agenda
• Develop and implement the global HR agenda and translate business needs to concrete initiatives and projects in alignment with other HR pillars
• Identify the local HR services needs, mobilise and engage the HR community to drive priorities based on clear SLAs and guidelines
• Escalation point for complex employee relation support
• Collaborate with the Segment HRBP team and act as a change agent, supporting management teams solve organization, people & change-related matters
• Leverage people data to provide insights and trends to inform decision making and support improvement to the HR service and procedure

Labour Relations
• As the interface to the social partners, you participate in regular meetings with them and where relevant negotiate together with our Managing Director on Collective Bargaining Agreements
• You advise business leaders and work with HR stakeholders on topics and questions related to the labour relations activities
• You prepare documents and other material relevant for the conversations with our social partners

What will you bring to the table?
• Relevant progressive working experience from operational to strategic HR consulting, business partnering and/or management roles, from local to regional or global scope, over a span of several years
• In-depth knowledge of the Austrian labor law combined with practical experience collaborating with social partners.
• Degree preferably in law, business administration or economics with a specialisation in HRM or additional equivalent work Experience
• Strong organisation & execution skills , proven track record working in an international, fast-paced, deadline-driven environment
• Strategic partnering experience, coaching sr leaders as well as talent management, organisation development expertise
• Comfortable to navigate in an international and matrix HR environment, having worked in partnership with HR CoEs
• Strong stakeholder management and the ability to influence a variety of stakeholders within thе organization
• Experience of working with HR data, and an analytical mindset, to shape and influence people outcomes and business decisions

At JET, this is how we play

Our teams forge connections internally and work with some of the best-known brands on the planet, giving us truly international impact in a dynamic environment.

Being the best at what we do isn’t just about delivering on our strategy. It's a competition for something incredibly valuable – our customers' choice. Every time a customer decides where to order, they're picking a side.

At the heart of the JET Customer League are our values and behaviours. They guide every interaction, every decision, every innovation. These are the actions we need to perform consistently and brilliantly, to surpass the competition and earn our customers’ loyalty, again and again.

Fun, fast-paced and supportive, the JET culture is about movement, growth, helping one another to succeed and celebrating wins. By truly living our values and embodying our behaviours, we’re building a customer-first culture which enables us to stay one step ahead of the competition.

Inclusion, Diversity & Belonging

No matter who you are, what you look like, who you love, or where you are from, you can find your place at Just Eat Takeaway.com. We’re committed to creating an inclusive culture, encouraging diversity of people and thinking, in which all employees feel they truly belong and can bring their most colourful selves to work every day.

What else are we delivering?

Want to know more about our JETers, culture or company? Have a look at our career site where you can find people's stories, blogs, podcasts and more JET journeys.

Are you ready to join the team? Apply now!

jobs.description:

We are seeking an experienced and dynamic Team Lead – US Healthcare Recruitment to lead and manage a team of healthcare recruiters focused on the US staffing market. The ideal candidate will have strong hands-on experience in US healthcare recruitment along with proven leadership skills to drive team performance, ensure compliance, and achieve revenue and placement targets.


This role requires expertise in recruiting healthcare professionals such as RNs, LPNs, CNAs, Physicians, and Allied Health professionals across contract, travel, and permanent placements.

Team Management & Leadership



 Lead, mentor, and manage a team of US healthcare recruiters.
 Assign job requisitions and monitor daily/weekly performance metrics.
 Conduct regular team meetings, training sessions, and performance reviews.
 Provide guidance on sourcing strategies, screening techniques, and closing methods.
 Drive team motivation and ensure target achievement.

Recruitment & Delivery



 Handle critical, high-priority, or complex requisitions.
 Source and recruit healthcare professionals across the US.
 Ensure proper screening, credential verification, and compliance checks.
 Manage client/VMS/MSP requirements effectively.

 Oversee documentation accuracy in ATS/CRM systems.

 Identify gaps and implement process improvements.

 Bachelor’s degree in HR, Business Administration, Healthcare Administration, or related field.
 4–8 years of experience in US healthcare recruitment.
 Minimum 1–2 years of team handling experience.
 Strong knowledge of US healthcare roles, licensing, and compliance.
 Experience working with VMS/MSP clients and job portals.

jobs.description:
Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya, Khordha has issued a teacher recruitment notification for contractual appointments for the academic session 2025–2026. The school is inviting applications from qualified and dedicated educators for multiple TGT and PGT teaching positions across science, language, and commerce streams.



Candidates who meet the academic requirements and are comfortable teaching in both English and Odia medium are encouraged to apply. Applicants must follow the postal submission process strictly as mentioned in the notification. If you are seeking government school jobs in Odisha, this opportunity should not be missed.

Post Graduate Teachers (PGT)



Trained Graduate Teachers (TGT)



Job Type: Contractual Basis

English



Physics



Chemistry



Mathematics



Biology



Economics



Computer Science




TGT




English



Hindi

Science

The school is a network of quality government schools established to provide modern education with strong academic standards. These institutions aim to nurture talented students from diverse backgrounds and prepare them for higher education and competitive careers. The Khordha campus follows a structured curriculum, promotes bilingual instruction, and emphasizes technology-enabled learning.



Job Location



The appointment will be at Begunia, District Khordha – 752062, Odisha..



Eligibility & Qualifications



For PGT




Post Graduation in the concerned subject



B.Ed. mandatory



Desirable: Ability to teach in English & Odia medium



Knowledge of computer applications preferred




For TGT




Graduation in the concerned subject



B.Ed. mandatory



Desirable: Ability to teach in English & Odia medium



Knowledge of computer applications preferred




Salary / Remuneration




PGT: ₹25,000 per month



TGT: ₹20,000 per month




How to Apply – Postal Mode Only



Candidates must send the prescribed application form along with required documents to the Nodal Principal via Speed Post or Registered Post only.



Important: Do NOT submit applications by hand or via email. Applications received after the deadline will be rejected. The authority will not be responsible for postal delays and reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process without assigning reasons.



Postal Address:Nodal Principal,Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya,At/Po – Begunia, Dist – Khordha,Odisha – 752062



Last Date to Reach: 2nd March 2026



Important Dates



EventDateDate Posted14 February 2026Last Date for Receipt of Application2 March 2026



Official Notification



Applicants should carefully read the recruitment instructions issued by Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Khordha before sending their forms.




Official Notification: CLICK HERE








Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)





1. What vacancies are available at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Khordha?


The school is recruiting PGT and TGT teachers in languages, sciences, mathematics, social studies, and computer science.




2. What is the salary for teachers at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya?


PGTs will receive ₹25,000 per month and TGTs will receive ₹20,000 per month.




3. Is B.Ed. mandatory for Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya recruitment?


Yes, B.Ed. qualification is compulsory for both PGT and TGT posts.

No, applications must be sent only through Speed Post or Registered Post.

MANUU is a Central University established by an Act of Parliament in 1998. Spread across a large campus in Gachibowli, Hyderabad, the university is dedicated to promoting Urdu language education while advancing technical, professional, and higher learning. Named after Maulana Abul Kalam Azad, India’s first Education Minister, the institution stands for inclusivity, research, and academic excellence. MANUU plays a vital role in training teachers, scholars, and professionals across diverse disciplines.



Job Location




The walk-in interview will take place at the MANUU campus in Gachibowli, Hyderabad, Telangana.




Eligibility & Qualifications




Qualifications must be as per UGC norms



Relevant academic background in the applied discipline



Knowledge of Urdu is required




Salary & Benefits



The consolidated honorarium will be up to ₹50,000 per month as per UGC guidelines and university policies.



How to Apply – Walk-In Interview



Candidates fulfilling eligibility criteria may attend the interview at their own expense. They must bring:




Updated resume



Original educational and experience certificates



Proof of knowledge of Urdu



Testimonials



Passport-size photograph



One set of self-attested photocopies




Interview Schedule




Date: Tuesday, 24th February 2026




Venue



Committee Room,University Guest House,MANUU Campus,Gachibowli, Hyderabad – 500032, Telangana



Important Dates



EventDateDate Posted14 February 2026Walk-In Interview24 February 2026



Official Notification



Applicants should verify eligibility, documentation, and reporting time from the official recruitment advertisement issued by Maulana Azad National Urdu University Hyderabad.




Official Notification: CLICK HERE








Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)





1. What post is available at Maulana Azad National Urdu University?


The university is hiring Guest Faculty on a temporary basis.




2. When is the walk-in interview at MANUU Hyderabad?


The interview will be held on 24th February 2026.




3. What salary is offered for Guest Faculty at Maulana Azad National Urdu University?


The remuneration will not exceed ₹50,000 per month as per UGC norms.




4. Is Urdu knowledge compulsory for MANUU recruitment?


Yes, candidates must provide proof of knowledge of Urdu.




5. Where is MANUU located?


The university is situated in Gachibowli, Hyderabad, Telangana.

jobs.title: Work-from-Home Pharmacy Assistant Jobs
jobs.description:
Job Summary

Fresher Jobs Hub is offering an exciting opportunity for individuals to join a growing industry as a Work-from-Home Pharmacy Assistant. This remote role is designed for self-motivated individuals with a passion for helping others. You will play a crucial role in supporting pharmacists with administrative tasks, managing prescriptions, and providing customer service in a virtual environment. This position is ideal for recent graduates or those looking to start their career in the pharmaceutical industry, with the flexibility to work from the comfort of your own home.
Key Responsibilities
• * Prescription Management: Process and verify prescriptions accurately while adhering to regulatory guidelines.
• * Customer Support: Provide excellent customer service to patients, answering questions related to prescriptions, medication, and pharmacy services.
• * Inventory Monitoring: Assist with maintaining stock levels, ensuring that medications and supplies are available when needed.
• * Administrative Tasks: Manage patient records, handle medication refills, and track prescription statuses.
• * Collaboration with Pharmacists: Work closely with pharmacists to ensure prescriptions are filled accurately and on time.
• * Compliance: Ensure compliance with healthcare regulations and pharmacy policies, maintaining confidentiality of patient information.
• * Data Entry: Maintain accurate and up-to-date patient records and other necessary documentation.
• Required Skills and Qualifications
• * Education: High school diploma or equivalent; a pharmacy technician certification or related qualification is a plus.
• * Experience: Previous experience in customer service, retail pharmacy, or administrative roles is preferred but not required.
• * Technical Skills: Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite and familiarity with pharmacy software systems.
• * Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills to effectively interact with patients and team members.
• * Attention to Detail: Strong attention to detail, especially in processing prescriptions and maintaining records.
• * Organizational Skills: Ability to multitask and prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.
• * Time Management: Ability to manage time efficiently and work independently with minimal supervision.
• Experience
• * Preferred: Previous experience in a pharmacy or healthcare setting is an advantage.
• * Entry-Level: This role is open to freshers, with on-the-job training provided for those without prior experience in pharmacy assistance.
• Working Hours
• * Flexible Schedule: This is a remote position with flexible working hours, providing the opportunity to balance work and personal commitments.
• * Full-Time/Part-Time: Available in both full-time and part-time capacities, with the possibility of adjusting hours based on workload.
• Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities
• * Pharmacy Knowledge: Basic understanding of pharmacy operations, medications, and prescriptions.
• * Customer Service Excellence: Ability to provide a high level of customer service in a virtual environment.
• * Confidentiality and Compliance: Understanding of HIPAA (Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act) and maintaining patient confidentiality.
• * Problem-Solving Skills: Ability to resolve issues and find solutions to challenges encountered during work.
• Benefits
• * Remote Work: Enjoy the flexibility of working from home, reducing commuting time and costs.
• * Career Growth: Access to training and development opportunities to advance in the pharmaceutical or healthcare industry.
• * Work-Life Balance: Flexible work hours that allow you to manage both professional and personal commitments.
• * Competitive Salary: A competitive compensation package commensurate with experience and job performance.
• * Health and Wellness Benefits: Access to health insurance options and other wellness-related benefits.
• Why Join Fresher Jobs Hub?
• * Dynamic Work Environment: Fresher Jobs Hub fosters a positive and collaborative work culture where your contributions matter.
• * Supportive Team: You ll be part of a supportive team that values your growth and provides ongoing guidance and mentorship.
• * Opportunity for Career Advancement: As you gain experience, there are ample opportunities for you to progress within the healthcare and pharmacy sector.
• * Flexible and Inclusive: We offer a work environment that promotes work-life balance, making it ideal for individuals from all walks of life.
• How to Apply

If you are excited about this opportunity to work as a Work-from-Home Pharmacy Assistant with Fresher Jobs Hub, we would love to hear from you!
To apply, please send your updated resume and a brief cover letter explaining your interest in the role to our recruitment team. Be sure to include your contact information and any relevant experience or qualifications.

jobs.title: Training Specialist I (A), Prime Video - Global Shared Services (GSS)
jobs.description:
DESCRIPTION

The Prime Video team obsessively focuses on one mission: to give consumers the world’s best-in-class digital video customer experience. Prime Video delivers an entertainment destination unlike any other — fast, reliable, personal, effortless, and delightful. The Global Shared Services (GSS) team is part of the Prime Video organization and delivers Marketing and Merchandising services to the Prime Video products like trafficking and placements for US, EU, SEA, LATCANZ, IN and JP marketplaces. We are looking for a Training Specialist to join our team who can dive deep into complex content about our tools and systems, and develop learning solutions that meet the business needs of the Prime Video marketing operations program. In this role, you will oversee the full life cycle of a learning solution. From inception, development, execution, to monitoring results.

This is a contractual role for 6 months

Key job responsibilities
• Partner with the Campaign/ Design Operations team to understand the learning needs of the business and execute on them.
• Partner with Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) to develop learning solutions that are accurate to the processes of the operation.

-Deliver training sessions both in-person and virtually for population in SJO and India mainly -Assign and monitor completion of self-directed trainings using Amazon Learn tool
• Support SMEs that are certified facilitators in training delivery sessions
• Perform needs analysis and evaluate existing documentation to identify the most appropriate training approach and content to meet the demands of the learning objectives and audience.
• Help maintain existing programs to ensure the content remains complete and relevant.

A day in the life
Start the day by meeting with the Campaign/Design Operations team to understand their latest learning needs and priorities for the Prime Video marketing operations program. Collaborate with them to develop an appropriate training strategy and content.

Connect with subject matter experts (SMEs) in the organization to gather accurate information about the tools, systems, and processes that the training needs to cover. Work closely with the SMEs to create effective and engaging training materials.

Prepare for and deliver both in-person and virtual training sessions for the team members located in Costa Rica and India. Ensure the training content is well-structured and easy to comprehend.

Assign self-directed training courses using the Amazon Learn tool and monitor completion rates. Follow up with learners as needed.

Support the SMEs who are certified training facilitators by assisting them with the delivery of training programs.

Analyze existing training documentation and resources to identify areas for improvement. Work on updating and maintaining the content to keep it current and relevant.

Collaborate with the broader team to contribute to the goal of building an enterprise-grade knowledge platform that serves as a single source of truth for the GSS, Global Operations, and marketing teams.

Towards the end of the day, review feedback from recent training sessions and make notes for future improvements to the training program.

About the team
By 2027, we will build an enterprise-grade knowledge platform that serves as the single source of truth for GSS, Global Operations, and marketing teams In Prime Video. This platform will standardize taxonomies, metadata, and content structures to enable seamless Large Language Models (LLM) integration. The system will deliver three key benefits: i) automated content creation and intelligent search, ii) predictive insights and real-time content optimization and iii) scalable knowledge delivery across the organization. These capabilities will drive operational efficiency through AI-enabled services built on knowledge ecosystems.

BASIC QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience in process training
• Knowledge of performance-based instructional theories and adult learning principles.
• Experience creating assessments based on learning and performance objectives.
• Demonstrated experience designing and developing training materials in all modalities, including ILT, eLearning, video scripts
• Experience collaborating with stakeholders, SMEs, front-line managers and front line employees
• High standard of verbal and written communication skills while maintaining the highest standard of professionalism at all times.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience using data and metrics to determine and drive improvements
• Demonstrated working knowledge of eLearning development tools such as Captivate, Articulate Storyline
• Strong writer with a passion for clarity and helping people learn.
• Experience designing and building online job aids and references, and writing materials that support classroom training events or content for e-learning solutions.
• Knowledge and application of instructional theories, adult learning, on the job learning, knowledge management theories, and principles in both on-line and classroom instruction.

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

jobs.title: Supervisor-Training

POSITION SUMMARY

Meet with managers, department and division heads to discuss staffing needs, recruitment needs, open requisitions, and required/desirable qualifications. Develop learning strategies and plans with management based upon deficiencies identified in a Needs Assessment. Design, develop, and produce training materials (., facilitator/participant workbooks, manuals, brochures, job aids, posters). Prepare for training classes (., materials, setup classes, breakdown classes). Design and create interactive training in various formats. Conduct stand-up training to groups of employees. Monitor and ensure departments are conducting safety training and orientation.

Assist management in hiring, training, scheduling, evaluating, counseling, disciplining, and motivating and coaching employees. Follow all company and safety and security policies and procedures; report accidents, injuries, and unsafe work conditions to manager. Ensure uniform and personal appearance are clean and professional; maintain confidentiality of proprietary information. Speak with others using clear and professional language; prepare and review written documents accurately and completely; answer telephones using appropriate etiquette. Develop and maintain positive working relationships with others; support team to reach common goals; listen and respond appropriately to the concerns of other employees. Welcome and acknowledge all guests according to company standards; anticipate and address guests’ service needs; assist individuals with disabilities; thank guests with genuine appreciation. Ensure adherence to quality expectations and standards. Stand, sit, or walk for an extended period of time or for an entire work shift. Enter and locate work-related information using computers and/or point of sale systems. Move, lift, carry, push, pull, and place objects weighing less than or equal to 10 pounds without assistance. Perform other reasonable job duties as requested by Supervisors.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Education: High school diploma or . equivalent.

Related Work Experience: At least 1 year of related work experience.

jobs.title: AI Filmmaking Internship – Thondiriyan (Training Program)
jobs.description:
Company Description

META ULAGAM is an emerging AI-powered film and VR storytelling studio based in Chennai.

We focus on building next-generation cinematic experiences using Artificial Intelligence, Unreal Engine, Blender, and immersive technologies.

Our mission is to create original Tamil AI film projects while training the next generation of creators through hands-on, project-based learning programs like Thondiriyan.

We combine storytelling, technology, and innovation to build future-ready filmmakers.

Role Description

Position: AI Filmmaking Intern (Training Program)

Program Name: Thondiriyan – AI Filmmaking Internship

Location: Chennai (On-site)

Duration: 4–6 Weeks

Program Fee: ₹5,000 (Training-Based Internship)

This is a structured internship training program designed for students and beginners who want practical exposure to AI-driven filmmaking.

Interns will:

• Learn AI-assisted script development

• Create AI-generated video sequences

• Work with Unreal Engine for cinematic scenes

• Explore Blender for 3D assets

• Understand AI-based production workflows

• Contribute to short film and portfolio projects

This is a hands-on learning experience focused on real project execution rather than theory.

Qualifications

• Basic understanding or interest in AI, filmmaking, or digital media

• Familiarity with video editing, Blender, or Unreal Engine is a plus (not mandatory)

• Strong creative mindset and willingness to learn

• Passion for storytelling and emerging technologies

• Good communication and collaboration skills

• Students from Viscom, Film Studies, Animation, Media, Computer Science, or related fields are encouraged to apply
• No advanced technical experience required — beginners with strong interest are welcome.
