jobs.title: Primary Systems Analyst, Senior Associate
jobs.description:
Why this role is important to us

The team you will be joining is a part of Charles River Development (or CRD), that became a part of State Street in 2018. CRD helps create enterprise investment management software solutions for large institutions in the areas of institutional investment, wealth management and hedge funds. Together we have created first open front-to-back platform - State Street Alpha, that was launched in 2019.

Join us if delivering next generation infrastructure, using emerging technologies like AI and Blockchain sounds like a challenge you are up for.



What you will be responsible for

Working closely with clients, provide application administration and support for client production Charles River IMS solutions, including: 

User administration/privileges

Configuration and testing of software changes and operational processes

Interface/integration configuration, testing, and support

Assistance resolving escalated problems

Migration of changes and problem resolutions to production environments

System availability

Performance troubleshooting 

Charles River IMS and database software patches

Charles River IMS version upgrades

Business Continuity/Disaster Recovery assistance



Working with CRD colleagues to smoothly transition new clients to production operation.

Working with vendors as partners to deliver a tightly integrated, seamless service to Charles River Clients.

Participation in the development and on-going refinement, enhancement and continuous process improvement for the services.

Participation in the investigation, implementation, and operation of 3rd party tools to enhance/improve, automate, and streamline the delivery of the services.



What we value

A degree of technical aptitude and troubleshooting skills

A strong sense of customer service, attention to detail, and issue ownership



Education & Preferred Qualifications

A BS degree in a technical discipline such as Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics or a BA in Finance or Business with an IT concentration.

A minimum of 5+years of progressively responsible experience.

Experience in managing and supporting mission critical production software applications is required.

Experience with SQL, MS SQL Server preferred.

Expert in PowerShell development and scripting with demonstrable projects for automation

Mainly working in Windows Servers and not Linux

A desire and sense of satisfaction to automate tasks done previously were manual

Hands on scripting experience in combination with scheduler tools such as BMC Control-M, Autosys, etc.

Experience with log aggregation tools to identify errors in software such as Elastic (ELK) stack

Working knowledge of the Azure Cloud

Nice to have - knowledge of Azure DevOps

Experience in DevOps (or related) technologies is preferred.

Proven ability to work in a mission-critical operations and production support environment.

Experience or familiarity with servers and networks is preferred.

Proven ability to partner with various internal departments to deliver superior customer service.

Break down moderately complex processes into simple and reliable components.

Experience with automation using scripting languages such as Python/ Perl and PowerShell.

Excellent customer service skills, technical troubleshooting skills, and interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills.

Database software or IT technical experience.

Charles River IMS or securities trading software experience is preferred.

A background in portfolio management and trading system applications is preferred.

Any experience with the following is preferred: databases, server operating systems, servers, networks, job scheduling software, system monitoring software, clusters/high availability systems, Disaster Recovery/Business Continuity, FIX.

Strong written and verbal communication skills.

Ability to manage multiple, simultaneous priorities.

Proven organizational skills with attention to detail.

Ability to achieve results without close supervision.

Self-motivated with the ability to operate independently and also has the strong desire to work as a member of a team.

Demonstrated practical, hands-on, can-do approach, and the ability to work efficiently and creatively.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.





About State Street

Across the globe, institutional investors rely on us to help them manage risk, respond to challenges, and drive performance and profitability. We keep our clients at the heart of everything we do, and smart, engaged employees are essential to our continued success.



We are committed to fostering an environment where every employee feels valued and empowered to reach their full potential. As an essential partner in our shared success, you'll benefit from inclusive development opportunities, flexible work-life support, paid volunteer days, and vibrant employee networks that keep you connected to what matters most. Join us in shaping the future.

jobs.title: Senior Analyst of Pricing Analytics
jobs.description:
Meet the Team  

 Join Cisco’s Pricing and Strategy team—an essential part of our Product Organization—where innovation meets impact. We develop pricing strategies, drive monetization initiatives, and optimize pricing models to enable Cisco’s platformization strategy, accelerate AI-driven offerings, and unlock cross-sell and upsell potential across our global portfolio.  

 Your Impact  

We are seeking a highly analytical and thorough professional to join Cisco’s Pricing team as a Sr. Analyst of Pricing Analytics. Collaborating with the Sr. Manager of Pricing Analytics, you will play a key role in delivering insights that drive pricing decisions across Cisco’s hardware, software, and services portfolio. You will help optimize value collection, strengthen driven positioning, and support the evolution of Cisco’s monetization models.

Key Responsibilities

*Partner with the Sr. Manager and multi-functional team members (strategy, finance, product management, and sales) to deliver actionable pricing insights
*Develop and maintain financial and statistical models to evaluate price elasticity, willingness to pay, and product/feature pricing dynamics
*Analyze transactional, usage, and financial data to find opportunities for pricing and discount optimization
*Developed pricing dashboards, reports, and tools to track pricing performance and discounting trends
*Conduct market and competitive analysis to inform pricing and monetization strategies

*Build clear, data-driven presentations and communicate findings to stakeholders at multiple levels of the organization
*Contribute to the continuous improvement of pricing processes, data accuracy, and analytics methodologies

Minimum Qualifications

*8 - 12 years of experience in data analytics, pricing analytics, financial/business analysis, revenue management, or related fields
*Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with experience in pricing, financial modeling, or data-driven decision support
*Proficiency with analytics tools (SQL, Python, R, Tableau, Power BI, or similar).
*Strong business acumen and ability to work with multi-functional teams
*Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate complex data into actionable insights

Preferred Qualifications

*Bachelor’s degree in finance, economics, statistics, business analytics, or related field (advanced degree a plus).
*Familiarity with SaaS, subscription, and consumption-based pricing models.
*Experience in high-tech, software, or consulting industries.

 



Why Cisco? At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.

Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere. 

We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

jobs.title: Senior Analyst- Performance Marketing ( Search + Social)
jobs.description:
About Us

At Assembly, we help brands find the change to fuel business growth. We are an award-winning global brand performance agency, home to 1,600 talented people across 25 offices globally. We create unique data, technology and media solutions that enable faster and smarter problem solving and an inspired, collaborative workplace culture.

At Assembly we embody three core values: Show Up - actively contribute to a space of personal and collective growth; Make Change - embrace obstacles as opportunities, taking intentional steps to drive positive change; and Win Well - approach success with integrity, responsibility, and a commitment to collaboration, understanding that the journey is as important as the destination. Together, we create an environment that fosters continuous learning, adaptability, and a shared passion for making a meaningful impact.

We stay ahead of what’s next, providing fresh insights to spark new ideas. We’re a trusted partner to our clients, working behind the scenes to bring imagination, depth, and clarity to their biggest challenges—in entertainment, technology, lifestyle, sports, and gaming. Together, we create with confidence

Overview

The Senior Digital Analyst will work closely with the line manager and accounts director to support in servicing our client . The digital analyst will run end-to-end paid campaigns and gain great exposure across multiple channels such as social, search and display programmatic.

Monitor campaign pacing and provide timely reporting on key metrics with ongoing commentary and actionable insights

Propose A/B testing with regular optimizations

Other role-related ad-hoc duties

Required Skills

 Skilled in Execution across Google, Meta, TikTok and Snapchat  Lead Gen experience is a highly preferable  Understanding of Lead flow and process - Lead generated > Qualified Lead > Converted Lead.  Understating of the general lead form and how do they work across platforms  Good with Excel - hands-on experience in excel reporting. 

Benefits

 Annual Leave in number of 20 allotted to all employees beginning of every calendar year.  Sick Leave in number of 12 is allotted effective DOJ and beginning of ever calendar year.  Other Leaves-Maternity Leave & Paternity Leaves, Birthday Leave Entitlement  Dedicated L&D Budget for all Teams to upskill & get certified  All employees are entitled for Group Personal Accident Cover & Life Cover Insurance.  Insurance coverage for the entire family (Employee + up to 7 dependents - Self, Spouse, up to 4 children, and Parents)  Monthly Cross Team Lunch  Rewards and Recognition program-Employee of the month, Star Performer, Tenure Celebration & many more 

 Equal Opportunities 

Assembly is an advocate for equal opportunity in the workplace. We are committed to ensuring equal opportunities regardless of race, colour, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability and gender identity. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know.

 Social and Environmental Responsibility 

At Assembly, we have a responsibility to bring impact into our every day. This means we must always look for ways in which to be conscious citizens in our roles to support society and environmental sustainability. We encourage employees to; be a conscious citizen by actively participating in our organisation's sustainability efforts, help us promote environmentally friendly practices within the workplace, collaborate with community organisations and stakeholders to support initiatives aligned with our company's values, participate in volunteer activities that benefit the community. Employees are also encouraged to make suggestions and evaluate our business practices to identify areas for improvement in social and environmental performance. Employees at Assembly demonstrate commitment to sustainability and inclusivity in their actions and behaviors.

jobs.title: Senior IT Support Analyst
jobs.description:
Our Story

At Alight, we believe a company’s success starts with its people. At our core, we Champion People, help our colleagues Grow with Purpose and true to our name we encourage colleagues to “Be Alight.”

Our Values

Champion People – be empathetic and help create a place where everyone belongs.

Grow with purpose – be inspired by our higher calling of improving lives.

Be Alight – act with integrity, be real and empower others.


It’s why we’re so driven to connect passion with purpose. Alight helps clients gain a benefits advantage while building a healthy and financially secure workforce by unifying the benefits ecosystem across health, wealth, wellbeing, absence management and navigation.

With a comprehensive total rewards package, continuing education and training, and tremendous potential with a growing global organization, Alight is the perfect place to put your passion to work.

Join our team if you Champion People, want to Grow with Purpose through acting with integrity and if you embody the meaning of Be Alight.

Learn more at careers.alight.com.

About the Role

The Support Analyst is responsible for 24X7 customer support for Leave of Absence Management software platforms, including troubleshooting and resolving incoming issues.

Responsibilities

·       Providing application support for proprietary Leave of Absence Management software products while adhering to Alight’s established SLAs.

·       Troubleshooting incoming applications/products Incidents, and if appropriate, convert Incidents into internal defect tracking system and route individuals/groups for resolution.

·       Working with Development teams to provide information on defects and workflow for issues reported.

·       Utilizing monitoring systems and proactive measures to minimize unacceptable performance which may severely impact business processing.

·       Working closely with multiple Shared Services units to ensure end-to-end visibility and optimal tuning of alerts/notifications.

·       Acting as liaison between internal/external customers and resolution of requests/issues, working closely with Management organization.

·       Establishing partnerships with providers of server, storage, network, platform services, systems management, Incident, Problem, and Change Management.

·       Reviewing department metrics to identify trends in application defects and escalate appropriately.

·       Supporting On-call rotation

Requirements

·       Demonstrate three years of experience with .NET core.

·       4+  years of experience AWS or other Cloud provider experience required.

·       Possess in depth knowledge with system tools such as New Relic, Elasticsearch, App Dynamics, or Splunk required.

·       Demonstrate experience with SQL Server including writing complex ad-hoc queries.

·       Possess knowledge of ITIL and service-based delivery models with 7x24x365 operations.

·       Participate in a weekly on-call rotation which includes nights, weekends, and holidays.

·       Provide customer service to positively influence other team members and partners. Ability to clearly and concisely communicate across technical and non-technical audiences.

Flexible Working

So that you can be your best at work and home, we consider flexible working arrangements wherever possible. Alight has been a leader in the flexible workspace and “Top 100 Company for Remote Jobs” 5 years in a row.

Benefits

We offer programs and plans for a healthy mind, body, wallet and life because it’s important our benefits care for the whole person. Options include a variety of health coverage options, wellbeing and support programs, retirement, vacation and sick leave, maternity, paternity & adoption leave, continuing education and training as well as a number of voluntary benefit options.

By applying for a position with Alight, you understand that, should you be made an offer, it will be contingent on your undergoing and successfully completing a background check consistent with Alight’s employment policies. Background checks may include some or all the following based on the nature of the position: SSN/SIN validation, education verification, employment verification, and criminal check, search against global sanctions and government watch lists, credit check, and/or drug test. You will be notified during the hiring process which checks are required by the position.

Our commitment to Inclusion

We celebrate differences and believe in fostering an environment where everyone feels valued, respected, and supported. We know that diverse teams are stronger, more innovative, and more successful.

At Alight, we welcome and embrace all individuals, regardless of their background, and are dedicated to creating a culture that enables every employee to thrive. Join us in building a brighter, more inclusive future.

As part of this commitment, Alight will ensure that people with disabilities are provided with reasonable accommodations for the hiring process. If reasonable accommodation is needed, please contact alightcareers@alight.com.

Equal Opportunity Policy Statement

Alight is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer and does not discriminate against anyone based on sex, race, color, religion, creed, national origin, ancestry, age, physical or mental disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital or domestic partner status, citizenship, military or veteran status, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity or expression, genetic information, or any other legally protected characteristics or conduct covered by federal, state or local law. In addition, we take affirmative action to employ disabled persons, disabled veterans and other covered veterans.

Alight provides reasonable accommodation to the known limitations of otherwise qualified employees and applicants for employment with disabilities and sincerely held religious beliefs, practices and observances, unless doing so would result in undue hardship. Applicants for employment may request reasonable accommodation/modification by contacting their recruiter.

Authorization to work in the Employing Country

Applicants for employment in the country in which they are applying (Employing Country) must have work authorization that does not now or in the future require sponsorship of a visa for employment authorization in the Employing Country and with Alight.

Note, this job description does not restrict management's right to assign or reassign duties and responsibilities of this job to other entities; including but not limited to subsidiaries, partners, or purchasers of Alight business units.

  



We offer you a competitive total rewards package, continuing education & training, and tremendous potential with a growing worldwide organization.
 


DISCLAIMER:


Nothing in this job description restricts management's right to assign or reassign duties and responsibilities of this job to other entities; including but not limited to subsidiaries, partners, or purchasers of Alight business units.

EC Analyst


 

About us

 

At ExxonMobil, our vision is to lead in energy innovations that advance modern living and a net-zero future. As one of the world’s largest publicly traded energy and chemical companies, we are powered by a unique and diverse workforce fueled by the pride in what we do and what we stand for.

 

The success of our Upstream, Product Solutions and Low Carbon Solutions businesses is the result of the talent, curiosity and drive of our people. They bring solutions every day to optimize our strategy in energy, chemicals, lubricants and lower-emissions technologies. 

 

We invite you to bring your ideas to ExxonMobil to help create sustainable solutions that improve quality of life and meet society’s evolving needs. Learn more about our What and our Why and how we can work together.

ExxonMobil’s affiliates in IndiaExxonMobil’s affiliates have offices in India in Bengaluru, Mumbai and the National Capital Region. 

 

ExxonMobil’s affiliates in India supporting the Product Solutions business engage in the marketing, sales and distribution of performance as well as specialty products across chemicals and lubricants businesses. The India planning teams are also embedded with global business units for business planning and analytics.

 

ExxonMobil’s LNG affiliate in India supporting the upstream business provides consultant services for other ExxonMobil upstream affiliates and conducts LNG market-development activities.

 

The Global Business Center - Technology Center provides a range of technical and business support services for ExxonMobil’s operations around the globe.

 

ExxonMobil strives to make a positive contribution to the communities where we operate and its affiliates support a range of education, health and community-building programs in India. Read more about our Corporate Responsibility Framework.

 

To know more about ExxonMobil in India, visit ExxonMobil India and the Energy Factor India.

Manage incidents, problem or work requests including configuration changes, minor enhancements, resolution of break-in fix issues, problem solving and troubleshooting, business consulting, system upgrades, data/analysis maintenance, user training and collaborationCoordinate efforts with other IT support teams (SAP, Non-SAP, other applications)Gather and analyze business requirements from stakeholdersSet up configuration, implement changes, perform unit/integration testingWork with business users and external partners Assist with work estimation and planning as part of Agile implementation in the teamAbout You

Nice-to-Haves: Java full stack development with Oracle ExadataFundamentals of cloud computing and knowledge of AWS services like ROSA, AWS RDS etc.Experience of supporting patch upgradesBachelor’s degree in information technology or master's in computer applications or a related field3 to 5 years of IT experience with at-least 3 years relevantYour benefits 

An ExxonMobil career is one designed to last. Our commitment to you runs deep: our employees grow personally and professionally, with benefits built on our core categories of health, security, finance and life. We offer you: 

Competitive compensation Medical plans, maternity leave and benefits, life, accidental death and dismemberment benefits Retirement benefits Global networking & cross-functional opportunitiesAnnual vacations & holidaysDay care assistance programTraining and development programTuition assistance programWorkplace flexibility policyRelocation programTransportation facilityPlease note benefits may change from time to time without notice, subject to applicable laws. Job Description

Assist clients in finding the best international and domestic travel deals tailored to their specific needs.

Handle client requests including reservations, transfers, changes, and cancellations; provide alternative travel options when necessary. Book domestic and international reservations for air travel, rail tickets, hotel accommodations, and car rentals.

Adhere strictly to Service Level Agreements (SLAs) to ensure timely and accurate service delivery.

Collaborate effectively with interoffice departments to fulfill client requirements, including Management Information Systems (MIS) support.

Strong understanding of international fares, routings, and visa processing requirements.

Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written, with a customer-oriented approach.

IATA certificate desirable and would add advantage.

jobs.title: Senior Consultant, NetSuite | India Operations
jobs.description:
Myers-Holum is expanding operations to Bangalore, India, and is actively seeking an experienced Senior Consultant to play a pivotal role in the expansion of the India Practice.

At a glance:

The Senior Consultant, is someone who has 5+years of end to end NetSuite implementation experience. but also has the knack for excellent customer service. You are leading projects all the way from discovery/requirements gathering to training and deployment. You get the chance to work alongside other leaders of the organization like Managers and Solution Architects. The stakeholders will rely on you for questions regarding their project and you get the chance to do some creative solutioning. This role will also allow you to propel yourself into a Principal consultant role which is the next step to a leadership seat at the table.

Your Role:
• Ability to lead full-cycle NetSuite implementation projects by translating complex business requirements and processes into NetSuite technical designs in a remote or in-person capacity as requested by the client, including but not limited to video or onsite interaction
• Solution delivery responsibilities span all project phases, including: discovery, design, build, testing, training, and deployment
• Perform fit/gap analysis on business requirements en route to system design and execution
• Develop wireframe and schematic diagrams to support customer requirements gathering and overall business process discovery
• Lead project management activities such as project planning, creation of work breakdown structures, and change control
• Collaborate and work closely with in-house development team to implement custom solutions. Develop these custom solutions in a clear and comprehensive Technical Design Documents.
• Act proactively and as a trusted client advocate during engagements by providing implementation best practices.
• Contribute to various internal MHI initiatives including resource mentorship and ongoing NetSuite education
• Willingness to learn and develop NetSuite product skills in all areas as required by customer engagements
• Contribute to various internal MHI initiatives including resource mentorship and ongoing education

Your Background:
• 3+ years of relevant consulting or industry experience
• Hands-on Functional NetSuite ERP Implementation Experience with 5-8+ end-to-end enterprise or medium-sized NetSuite engagements - OR- has led 8+ small engagements through go-live
• Undergraduate degree or MBA in field of Business, Finance, Accounting, Software or relevant field
• Strong background in finance/accounting, consulting and advisory services, general services-specific industry experience
• NetSuite certifications highly preferred – NetSuite ERP consultant, NetSuite Certified Administrator, and SuiteFoundation
• Experience and knowledge of best practices surrounding NetSuite technical capabilities such as: SuiteFlow, SuiteScript, and SuiteTalk. Effectiveness in designing end-to-end solutions with these capabilities in mind.
• Experience with specialized NetSuite process areas and products is preferred, these include: Advanced Manufacturing, Advanced Revenue Management, Demand Planning, Services Resource Planning, OpenAir, and SuiteCommerce Advanced

Your Interests:
• Ability to lead certain components of projects with minimal supervision and have the ability to be “The Lead” on mid-sized engagements
• Continuous improvement as you train to be a subject matter expert with NetSuite while working alongside peers and have significant exposure to consultants senior to you
• Working with people in a career where you will be client facing

Why Become an MHIer

Your Life at Myers-Holum & What you Can Expect:

Do you desire collaboration? Are you ready to shape your future and positively influence change for your customers? If so, then it's time to join the MHI Team where you can own your individuality and collaborate with other curious and thought-provoking minds. Discover what you are capable of by paving your path through MHI using your expertise and discovering your true potential.

Every MHIer is committed to our mission and operating principles; We remain curious as we lead with a genuine interest in people, ideas, and the unknown. We remain humble in knowing we can change how we currently do things and it is our ability to learn and grow that makes us a success. We remain resilient in understanding that success is not linear and that through reflection and a steadfast passion for betterment, we can continue our mindful and purposeful growth.

A little about “Us”

We’ve been around for 40 years. You’ll get stability & growth with us. Myers-Holum is a technology and management consulting firm that was founded in 1981 and continues to grow year after year. Today we have over 400 remote employees sitting across ten countries; United States, Canada, Mexico, Chile, Uruguay, Philippines, Vietnam, India & Pakistan.

The Partnerships we’ve built. Our cutting-edge technology partners include Oracle NetSuite, Stripe, Google Cloud Platform, Zone Billing, Celigo, and Boomi all working with us to provide the best customer experience throughout each implementation.

Our Structure. We’re a boutique firm with a strong internal framework. Our powerful model includes robust Sales, Solution Architecture, Resourcing & Enablement, Consulting, Project Management, Managed Services & Development, and Integration departments with subject matter experts sitting in each function.

Our Employees. We’re a company that recognizes we’re only as strong as our people and each person who joins our firm contributes to our well-being. We strive to ensure all employees have a career path within Myers-Holum for both upward and lateral opportunities while maintaining a healthy work-life balance.

We’re growing and making waves along the way, join us on this journey!

Our Benefits
• MHI offers a competitive base salary, incentive pay, and comprehensive benefits including medical, dental, vision, retirement plan, and paid time off. Full package offerings are based on the Country in which you reside.
• Company access to training and full coverage for certification/exam fees in a variety of products and professional skill sets
• Career growth and upward mobility to meet your long-term career goals with mid-year and annual reviews scheduled on a recurring basis
• MHI invests in our employee’s health by offering a company medical insurance policy that covers 100% of premiums for the individual employee with a ZERO deductible in the United States
• Remote working opportunity when not traveling for client requirements with full access to the team through technology

Our Process:

Our interview process is efficient and provides you with an opportunity to showcase your strengths, current abilities and share your future career aspirations while learning whether Myers-Holum would be a good fit for you. You will be paired with a member of our recruiting team who will handle all of the logistics as well as provide thoughtful feedback after each touchpoint to ensure you are kept within the loop from start to finish. Our recruiting timeline can be flexible to align with your circumstances; our typical timeline can take 2-4 weeks to complete however this can be adjusted or expedited depending on your needs. You can expect the following touchpoints when interviewing with MHI
• 30-minute call with our recruiting team
• 60-minute video call with a MHI Team Lead, Delivery Manager, or Practice Manager
• 90-minute interactive “Case Study” session with a Delivery Manager or Practice Manager
• Executive leadership review and decision making

Our compensation ranges and packages are based on a wide array of factors unique to each candidate. It is not a common practice or guaranteed for an individual to be hired at or near the top of the range and compensation decisions are determined using a wide array of factors unique to each candidate, including but not limited to; skill set, years & depth of experience, certifications, and specific location due to cost of living & labor considerations; All of which will be considered during the interview and offer process. Salary ranges and incentive plans will differ in other countries in which MHI pays local currency.

We are dedicated to fostering a workplace environment that upholds and promotes equal employment opportunity, free from discrimination on the basis of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity, or Veteran status.

jobs.title: Remote Business Consultant Trainee
jobs.description:
Job Summary

Deloitte is seeking motivated and ambitious individuals to join our team as Remote Business Consultant Trainees. This is an exciting opportunity for recent graduates or early-career professionals to gain hands-on experience in business consulting, strategy development, and client engagement. As a trainee, you will work closely with senior consultants and project teams to support various business initiatives, analyze data, and contribute to delivering high-impact solutions to our clients—all from the comfort of your home.

Key Responsibilities
• Assist in the analysis and evaluation of client business processes, market trends, and performance metrics.
• Support senior consultants in preparing reports, presentations, and strategic recommendations.
• Participate in virtual client meetings and workshops, documenting insights and action points.
• Conduct research to identify best practices, emerging trends, and innovative solutions.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support project deliverables and timelines.
• Continuously update knowledge of industry standards, tools, and methodologies relevant to consulting.
• Contribute to internal initiatives aimed at improving operational efficiency and client satisfaction.

Required Skills and Qualifications
• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Economics, Management, or related field.
• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.
• Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.
• Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and familiarity with business analysis tools.
• Ability to manage multiple tasks in a remote work environment.
• Self-motivated, proactive, and eager to learn.

Experience
• No prior professional consulting experience required.
• Internships or academic projects related to business strategy, analytics, or management consulting are advantageous.

Working Hours
• Full-time remote position.
• Flexible schedule, with core collaboration hours to align with global teams.
• Occasional virtual meetings may require availability across different time zones.

Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities
• Strong research and analytical thinking to evaluate complex business problems.
• Excellent interpersonal and collaboration skills for virtual teamwork.
• Ability to adapt quickly to changing business priorities.
• Strong organizational skills to manage workload and meet deadlines.
• Competence in preparing professional client-facing documents and presentations.

Benefits
• Competitive trainee stipend with potential for performance-based incentives.
• Comprehensive online training and mentorship from senior consultants.
• Exposure to global business projects and learning opportunities.
• Access to Deloitte’s knowledge resources, tools, and career development programs.
• Flexible remote work environment with work-life balance support.

Why Join Deloitte?
• Be part of a globally recognized consulting firm with a strong reputation for excellence.
• Accelerate your professional growth through hands-on experience and structured training.
• Collaborate with diverse, high-performing teams on impactful business projects.
• Build a career path toward becoming a full-fledged Business Consultant with Deloitte.
• Join a culture that values innovation, inclusion, and continuous learning.

How to Apply

Interested candidates are invited to submit their resume and a brief cover letter highlighting relevant skills and interests via Deloitte’s official careers portal: www.deloitte.com/careers.

jobs.title: Retail & Commercial Strategy Consultant for Landmark Mall Development
jobs.description:
تفويض استشاري استراتيجي
تموضع تجاري وتسويقي لمول رائد – حلب

نعمل على تطوير مشروع مول متعدد الاستخدامات في مدينة حلب، يهدف إلى أن يكون وجهة حضرية متكاملة للتسوق، الخدمات، الترفيه، والأنشطة المجتمعية ضمن سياق اقتصادي متجدد.

نبحث عن مستشار استراتيجي أول في تطوير وتسويق المراكز التجارية للمساهمة في صياغة الرؤية التجارية، التحقق من الجدوى السوقية، ووضع إطار تفعيل تأجيري احترافي للمشروع.

هذه المهمة استشارية استراتيجية وليست تنفيذًا تسويقيًا تقليديًا.

المتطلبات الأساسية

إتقان اللغة العربية (كتابةً ومحادثةً)

القدرة على التعاون المباشر مع فريق العمل المحلي لدراسة السوق ميدانيًا

خبرة مثبتة في تطوير أو إعادة تموضع مراكز تجارية أو أصول تجارية كبرى

قدرة تحليلية عالية ورؤية استراتيجية طويلة المدى

منهجية العمل

لا نرغب بفرض نطاق عمل محدد مسبقًا، بل ندعو المتقدمين إلى:

اقتراح نطاق العمل الأنسب للمشروع

تحديد المخرجات الاستشارية المقترحة

توضيح منهجية دراسة السوق والتحقق من الطلب

اقتراح إطار تموضع تجاري وهوية تنافسية

وضع تصور لاستراتيجية المزيج التأجيري (Tenant Mix) واستقطاب العلامات الرئيسية

سيتم اعتماد نطاق العمل بناءً على الطرح المقدم من المستشار وخبرته العملية.

سياق المشروع

يستهدف المشروع:

خدمة شريحة حضرية واسعة

استقطاب مشغلين رئيسيين (هايبرماركت، مطاعم، عيادات، خدمات، ترفيه)

سد فجوات واضحة في العرض التجاري المحلي

تأسيس أصل استثماري طويل الأمد

سيعمل المستشار المختار مع فريق الإدارة لتطوير:

تحليل تنافسي شامل

سردية تجارية جاذبة للمستثمرين والمشغلين

خارطة طريق واقعية للتأجير والتفعيل

جلسة تعريف قبل تقديم العرض

نرحب بعقد جلسة تعريف افتراضية قبل تقديم العرض الاستشاري، لعرض:

موقع المشروع

المرحلة الحالية للتطوير

التوجه الاستثماري

الدراسات المتوفرة (إن وجدت)

وذلك لضمان تقديم عرض مهني دقيق وملائم.

هيكل التعاقد

المرحلة الأولى: دراسة سوق وتموضع استراتيجي

إمكانية التوسع إلى مرحلة التفعيل التأجيري

إمكانية تعاون طويل الأمد بناءً على الأداء

يمكن أن يشمل العرض:

أتعاب ثابتة

حافز مرتبط بالأداء

أو هيكل هجين وفقًا لاقتراح المستشار

متطلبات التقديم

يرجى تضمين:

خبرات سابقة ذات صلة في تطوير أو إعادة تموضع مراكز تجارية

تأكيد إتقان اللغة العربية

المنهجية المقترحة للعمل

نطاق العمل والمخرجات المقترحة

الجدول الزمني والتكلفة

Contract duration of 3 to 6 months. with 30 hours per week.

Languages: Arabic. You are expected to have a fluent level of English.

Mandatory skills: Market Analysis, Marketing Strategy, Architectural Design, Graphic Design, Lead Generation

jobs.title: Merchandising Manager - Royapettah - Immediate Hiring
jobs.company: Sanvi Engineering And Business Consulting Solutions
jobs.description:
• Job Title:* Merchandising Manager
• Work Location:* Royapettah, Chennai
• Experience:* 20-25 years
• Salary:* Rs. 90,000 - Rs. 1,00,000 per month

Job Description

As a Merchandising Manager, you'll be a key player in ensuring the success and profitability of our woven garments. You'll be responsible for leading the entire merchandising process, from concept to delivery, ensuring our products meet market demands and company objectives.

Key Responsibilities
• *Strategic Leadership:* Develop and implement merchandising strategies aligned with company goals, driving sales growth, improving profitability, and enhancing customer satisfaction.
• *Product Development & Sourcing:*
• Oversee the product development process from initial concept, vendor negotiation, and product sourcing.
• Collaborate with design, production, and quality teams to develop creative and innovative samples based on market trends and buyer requirements.
• Manage and approve fabric, trim, and accessory sourcing, ensuring timely in-house delivery with good quality and quantities.
• Ensure all product details, from sample development to lab testing, cutting, washing, and finishing, meet required standards.
• *Order Management & Execution:*
• Lead and supervise the merchandising team's activities throughout the entire order process, ensuring customer satisfaction and on-time delivery.
• Conduct garments costing, negotiate with foreign buyers and local agents, and confirm orders in terms of price, quality, and lead time.
• Work with factories to create and execute Time & Action Plans for loaded garment orders, tracking development and production issues.
• Monitor daily production status, fabric and trim inventory, and support the factory for smooth production.
• *Market Analysis & Sales Optimization:*
• Analyze sales data, market trends, and customer behavior to optimize product assortment, inventory levels, and plan ranges.
• Develop and present merchandising and promotional programs to align with marketing and sales strategies.
• Conduct regular store visits (if applicable) to assess and improve merchandising practices and ensure product placement.
• *Team Leadership & Development:* Lead, mentor, and manage a team of merchandising associates, setting clear objectives and fostering effective performance.
• *Reporting & Communication:* Prepare detailed reports on merchandising performance, providing data-driven recommendations and communicating updates to stakeholders.
• *Quality Assurance:* Work closely with QA for timely inspection and delivery, managing any complaints or deviations from quality standards.

Required Skills & Qualifications
• Proven experience in a senior merchandising role within the woven garments manufacturing industry.
• Strong understanding of the entire production process, including woven fabric (denim and non-denim) and wash processes.
• Excellent communication, negotiation, and leadership skills.
• Ability to face challenging situations and solve problems effectively.
• Strategic thinker with strong analytical skills to interpret sales data and market trends.
• Detail-oriented and deadline-driven.

Work Location: Royapettah, Chennai.

Immediate joiners are preferred.

For more details contact us at 9176033506/9791033506.

Skills: data,leadership,sourcing,communication,merchandising,skills,customer,customer satisfaction,sales,product development

jobs.title: Technical Architect BY SCPO Planning Consulting
jobs.description:
Overview:
• Leading AI-driven Global Supply Chain Solutions Software Product Company and one of Glassdoor s Best Places to Work
• We are seeking an astute and enthusiastic individual who has a strong technical foundation with the additional ability to be hands-on with the Professional Services team as part of the development/deployment cycle, and deep knowledge of industry best practices, with the ability to lead and implement independently working with both the platform, and the solution teams.

Scope:
• Blue Yonder Technical Architect (SCPO Supply Chain Planning and Optimization) will be responsible for services delivery of product implementation and related integration.
• Core responsibilities include Architecting, designing (along with counterparts, customer, and Architects) and leading the technical team on projects.
• The team currently comprises of 80+ associates in India and is expected to grow rapidly. The incumbent should be passionate about working with new technologies and products and demonstrate the ability to learn quickly, have good interpersonal & communication skills verbal & written.

Desired skills and experience:
• Knowledge on
• OS Windows, Unix
• DB RDBMS Concepts, Snowflake, Oracle, MS SQL Server, SQL/ PL SQL
• Cloud and Architectural - Azure or equivalent, Microservices Architecture, Multi-Tenant
• Implementation experience using SCPO Platform (Demand, SCP/ESP, Fulfill, S&OP, IO)
• Preferrable Prior Blue Yonder Platform (PDC-Snowflake) and Cognitive planning exposure or trained
• Next Gen Skills - GenAI/Prompt Engineering, Data Science, Data Analytics, Agile, Python, AI/ML, Cloud Fun, Azure, Google Cloud Platform, AWS, Databases/Data Platforms(emerging) Snowflake, MongoDB, NoSQL, etc
• Professional Attributes:
• Excellent communication, Inter-personal, Stakeholder management, Analytical and Problem-solving skills
• Excellent organization and project documentation skills
• Meticulous planning with attention to detail and multi-tasking skills
• Domain knowledge: Understanding of Supply Chain Planning and how it integrates with other systems. Any industry specific experience is a big plus.
• Reporting Skills (if any) PowerBI, Cognos, etc

What you ll do:
• Analysis and assessment of existing customer s Blue Yonder solution for migration to Cognitive Planning
• Solution implementation, migration, enhancement, managed services, integration, custom projects either at the customer site or offshore.
• Estimate the workload of implementation activities that are within the scope of their skills; assess business needs that fall outside the standard solution, assess integration complexity, architecture.
• Conduct technical analysis sessions with customers and/or the project team to understand the functional and technical needs of the customer and develop technical solutions to meet those needs.
• Design and develop platform workflow/ user interface, integration scripts, Data mapping, data modeling and loading of data.
• Provide a variety of technical support to the project team, including quality assurance/design review, environment setup, software installation, configuration, operations consulting, troubleshooting, system testing, programming, etc.
• Handle activities with a diverse scope where analysis of data requires evaluation of identifiable factors.
• Provide internal and external training.
• Implementation and steady state support and contribute on internal development projects.
• Accelerate Time-to-Value for customers by iteratively delivering in short cycles.
• Continuously upskill on Blue Yonders product suite to convey relationships and touchpoints to the customer.
• Flexible working with overlapping time zones and work timings.
• Recognize and highlight incremental revenue opportunities within existing customer projects.
• Create artifacts towards reusability and automation decreasing implementation lifecycle and reducing errors post go-live

What we are looking for:
• 7 to 16 years of experience in Software industry; ideally a candidate that has started as a consultant and has worked his/her way to leading the technical team on 3-6+ complete implementation cycles.
• Strong programming experience and problem-solving skills
• Technical Background, Supply Chain Planning Industry Experience
• Expertise performance tuning techniques and ability to assist other team members with benchmarking and sizing exercises.
• Possess technical expertise on PL/SQL, database, ETL, Platform, Python and Perl scripting.
• Demonstrable experience leading, building, deploying and maintenance of enterprise solutions (cloud or on-premises)
• Good understanding of Web Technologies and API fundamentals
• Strong understanding on Cloud and Architectural design (Azure or equivalent, Microservices Architecture, Multi-Tenant)
• Demonstrable experience with Blue Yonder SCPO Platform.
• Hands-on development skills should not have moved away from development activities.
• Passionate about working with new technologies, products and demonstrate the ability to learn quickly, have good interpersonal & communication skills verbal & written.

Our Values

If you want to know the heart of a company, take a look at their values. Ours unite us. They are what drive our success and the success of our customers. Does your heart beat like oursFind out here: Core Values

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status.

jobs.title: Freelance E-commerce Consultant - Remote Setup Support
jobs.description:
Job Summary

The Elite Job is seeking a highly skilled and motivated Freelance E-commerce Consultant to provide expert remote support for setting up and optimizing online retail platforms. This role involves guiding businesses through the e-commerce setup process, ensuring seamless integration of technologies, improving online sales strategies, and enhancing customer experience. As a consultant, you will work independently, leveraging your in-depth knowledge of e-commerce platforms, digital marketing, and supply chain management to help clients build efficient and profitable online stores.
Key Responsibilities
• *

Consult with clients to understand their e-commerce goals, target market, and product offerings.
• *

Assist in selecting appropriate e-commerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, etc.) based on client needs.
• *

Guide clients through the end-to-end setup process including store configuration, product listing, payment gateway integration, and shipping setup.
• *

Analyze and optimize client websites for user experience, mobile responsiveness, and conversion rates.
• *

Develop customized solutions for inventory management, order processing, and customer support workflows.
• *

Provide training and documentation to clients on platform use, analytics tracking, and digital marketing best practices.
• *

Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues related to e-commerce tools and integrations.
• *

Stay updated on the latest e-commerce trends, tools, and technologies to provide cutting-edge advice.
• Required Skills and Qualifications
• *

Proven expertise with major e-commerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, BigCommerce).
• *

Strong understanding of online payment systems, shipping logistics, and fulfillment processes.
• *

Experience with digital marketing tools such as SEO, SEM, Google Analytics, and social media advertising.
• *

Excellent communication and client-facing skills, with the ability to translate technical jargon into simple terms.
• *

Ability to work independently, manage time effectively, and deliver results on deadline.
• *

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
• *

Basic understanding of web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) is a plus.
• Experience
• *

Minimum 3 years of experience in e-commerce consulting, digital retail management, or related fields.
• *

Hands-on experience managing multiple e-commerce projects or client accounts simultaneously.
• *

Experience working remotely and providing virtual consultations is highly desirable.
• Working Hours
• *

Flexible working hours with a focus on meeting client deadlines and milestones.
• *

Availability for periodic virtual meetings or trainings as per client schedules.
• *

Freelance role allowing autonomy and self-paced project management.
• Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities
• *

In-depth knowledge of e-commerce best practices and emerging market trends.
• *

Strong analytical skills to interpret sales data and recommend improvements.
• *

Ability to customize and adapt solutions based on diverse client needs.
• *

Proficient in project management tools and remote collaboration software (e.g., Trello, Slack, Zoom).
• *

Customer-focused mindset with an emphasis on delivering value and satisfaction.
• Benefits
• *

Work from anywhere with full remote flexibility.
• *

Opportunity to work with a diverse range of clients and industries.
• *

Competitive freelance compensation based on project scope and expertise.
• *

Access to continuous learning resources and industry insights.
• *

Build your professional portfolio and network through The Elite Jobs platform.
• Why Join The Elite Job?

The Elite Job is committed to empowering independent professionals and freelancers by providing access to high-impact projects and clients worldwide. As part of our community, you gain exposure to innovative businesses and the opportunity to shape the future of e-commerce. We value your expertise and provide the tools and support to help you thrive in a flexible, dynamic work environment.
How to Apply

Interested candidates are invited to submit their updated resume along with a cover letter detailing relevant experience and a portfolio of past e-commerce consulting projects (if available). Please send your application to us with the subject line: Freelance E-commerce Consultant Application.

jobs.title: Design Engineer - Outfitting (Piping)
jobs.description:
Role Overview:
As a Design Engineer, you will work closely with the design team and clients. Your primary responsibilities include creating detailed 3D models and drawings using ship design software, understanding production design for piping outfitting, studying PFDs, P&IDs, and procurement specifications, preparing isometrics and arrangement 3D models, ensuring compliance with international piping standards, reviewing vendors' documents, and being willing to relocate to client sites as required.

Key Responsibilities:
- Create detail design 3D models and drawings using ship design software like Cadmatic, Ship Constructor, or equivalent
- Understand detailed production design for piping outfitting, including 3D models
- Study and understand PFDs, P&IDs, and procurement specifications
- Prepare isometrics and arrangement 3D models for basic detail and production stages
- Ensure compliance with international piping standards, piping components, and materials
- Review vendors' documents, drawings, datasheets, specifications, and calculations
- Prepare bill of materials and weight calculations
- Understand pipe support fabrication drawing, piping isometric sketches, and layout drawings
- Perform any other task or responsibilities assigned by the organization

Qualification Required:
- Diploma or Graduate in Mechanical Engineering (or equivalent) with a Post Graduate qualification in Piping from a recognized institute
- Up to 7 years of total work experience
- Up to 4 years of hands-on experience with 3D ship design software such as Cadmatic, ShipConstructor, AVEVA Marine, or similar tools
- Experience in detail or basic design projects in the area of Ship Outfitting (Piping) design or shipyard experience
- Good communication skills and customer service orientation
- Attention to detail and commitment to perfection in work
- Willingness to continue developing technical knowledge and skills
- Ready to serve a minimum service commitment of 1 year in the company
- Ready to relocate to Goa location

jobs.title: Marketing Executive
jobs.description:
POSITION SUMMARY

Promote awareness of brand image internally and externally. Use sales techniques that maximize revenue while maintaining existing guest loyalty to Marriott. Communicate with potential owners via telephone to set up preview package sales/tours. Encourage guests or callers to purchase or schedule preview package sales/tours. Explain details and requirements related to attending a sales presentation to potential owners. Verify that individuals meet eligibility requirements for preview package sales/tours prior to scheduling a tour for a Marriott vacation club property. Determine and give complimentaries to guests as gifts for their patronage (e.g., rewards points, show tickets). Perform general office duties to support Sales & Marketing (e.g., filing, sending emails, typing, faxing). Receive, record, and relay messages accurately, completely, and legibly.

Assist management in training, evaluating, counseling, and motivating and coaching employees; serve as a role model and first point of contact of the Guarantee of Fair Treatment/Open Door Policy process. Follow all company policies and procedures; ensure uniform and personal appearance are clean and professional; maintain confidentiality of proprietary information; protect the privacy and security of guests and coworkers. Welcome and acknowledge all guests according to company standards; anticipate and address guests’ service needs; thank guests with genuine appreciation. Speak with others using clear and professional language; prepare and review written documents accurately and completely; answer telephones using appropriate etiquette. Develop and maintain positive working relationships with others; support team to reach common goals; listen and respond appropriately to the concerns of other employees. Ensure adherence to quality expectations and standards. Move, lift, carry, push, pull, and place objects weighing less than or equal to 10 pounds without assistance. Perform other reasonable job duties as requested by Supervisors.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Education: High school diploma or G.E.D. equivalent.

Related Work Experience: At least 1 year of related work experience.

Supervisory Experience: No supervisory experience.

License or Certification: None

At Marriott International, we are dedicated to being an equal opportunity employer, welcoming all and providing access to opportunity. We actively foster an environment where the unique backgrounds of our associates are valued and celebrated. Our greatest strength lies in the rich blend of culture, talent, and experiences of our associates. We are committed to non-discrimination on any protected basis, including disability, veteran status, or other basis protected by applicable law.

When you join the Sheraton family, you become a member of its global community. We’ve been a place to gather and connect since 1937. At Sheraton, associates create a sense of belonging in more than 400 communities around the world. We invite, we welcome, and we connect guests through engaging experiences and thoughtful service. If you’re a team player who is excited to deliver a meaningful guest experience, we encourage you to explore your next career opportunity with Sheraton. Join us on our mission to be ‘The World’s Gathering Place’. In joining Sheraton Hotels & Resorts, you join a portfolio of brands with Marriott International. Be where you can do your best work,​ begin your purpose, belong to an amazing global​ team, and become the best version of you.

jobs.title: Executive Support Specialist – Digital Enablement
jobs.description:
This a Full Remote job, the offer is available from: India, Malaysia

Our people are foundational to our strategy– they are not ‘resources’ that we leverage! Our People team (formerly Human Resources) partners with leaders to engage and attract high performing, diverse, entrepreneurial talent. We continuously challenge ourselves to be BOLD in our thinking, design and delivery of people solutions that enable our people to be the best that they can be and drive exceptional ResMed success.

Let’s talk about the team:

We are seeking a tech-enabled Executive Support Specialist to transform how administrative support is delivered across our organization. Based in Kuala Lumpur, this role is part of our larger Shared Services team, working closely with colleagues across regions and reporting directly to a manager in San Diego, CA, USA.

The ideal candidate may come from one of two paths:

• An Executive Assistant/Administrative professional excited to adopt automation and AI to modernize support.
• An Automation/Workflow specialist eager to apply technical expertise in an executive-facing environment.

As an Executive Support Specialist – Digital Enablement, you will:

• Provide centralized executive assistant–style support.
• Apply your expertise in Power Automate, AI tools, and workflow optimization to redesign how administrative tasks are managed (from scheduling and travel booking to purchase order approvals and transactional workflows).
• Create digital-first solutions that reduce friction, increase efficiency, and elevate the employee and manager experience.
• Contribute to engagement activities and build Shared Services capability by coaching teammates in automation.

Let’s talk about the role:

Automation & AI Enablement
• Design, test, and maintain automated workflows for administrative and operational processes, including:
• Calendar management and meeting coordination.
• Travel booking and approvals.
• Purchase order (PO) and expense approval processes.
• Document routing, signatures, and records management.
• Broader operational and administrative workflows.
• Implement AI-powered solutions (Copilot, GPT, bots) to improve efficiency for executive assistants, managers, and employees.
• Continuously assess workflows to identify opportunities for automation, simplification, and scalability.

Executive Administrative Support (Technology-Enabled)
• Provide centralized EA-style support for executives remotely, balancing hands-on administrative tasks with automation-enabled workflows.
• Anticipate executive needs and deliver proactive, seamless support for calendar, travel, approvals, and expenses.
• Partner closely with other Executive Assistants and leaders to design workflows that are both efficient and intuitive.

Employee & Manager Experience
• Ensure automation solutions make work simpler and more intuitive for executives, assistants, and employees.
• Champion human-centered solutions that enhance, not diminish, the personal experience of support.
• Act as a trusted partner within the Administrative Assistant People Experience organization.

Engagement & Events
• Support employee engagement activities (wellness, recognition, culture events).
• Bring presence, passion, and commitment when supporting live, in-person events.

Collaboration, Training & Schedule
• Work as part of a global Shared Services team, collaborating across regions.
• Report directly to a manager in San Diego, USA, ensuring global alignment.
• Train and coach colleagues by sharing automation and AI expertise, enabling teammates to design and deliver their own solutions.
• Work onsite in the Kuala Lumpur office two days per week (Wednesdays & Thursdays) and work from home the remainder of the week.
• Adjust working hours on Tuesdays and Fridays (early morning to mid-afternoon) to overlap with San Diego colleagues.

Let’s talk about you:

Required (either track acceptable):

Track A (EA-first):
• 2–4 years of experience as an Executive Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or Shared Services or professional, supporting executives or senior leaders.
• Strong understanding of executive workflows (calendar, travel, expenses, approvals).
• Demonstrated curiosity and willingness to learn automation and AI tools.

Track B (Tech-first):
• 1–3 years of experience in automation, workflow design, or administrative process optimization.
• Strong expertise in Microsoft Power Automate (flows, connectors, Outlook, Teams, SharePoint integrations).
• Strong expertise with AI productivity tools (Copilot, GPT, chatbots).
• Willingness to develop EA support skills (confidentiality, executive presence, proactive admin support).

Shared Competencies (all candidates):
• Excellent collaboration skills; ability to partner across geographies.
• Excellent written and verbal communication skills; confident and discreet when engaging with executives.
• Strong communicator who takes ownership and initiative, is a relentless improver with customer empathy, and is results-oriented.
• Passionate about employee and manager experience, eager to design solutions that make work easier.
• Problem-solving mindset with the ability to translate pain points into elegant, scalable solutions.

Preferred:
• Experience supporting or partnering with executive assistants or administrative professionals.
• Knowledge of HRIS, finance, or travel systems (Workday, Concur, Egencia, etc.).
• Exposure to employee experience or culture initiatives.
• Degree in Human Resources or related field (considered an asset).

Why Join Us?

This is not a traditional EA or automation role — it is a hybrid, future-facing position. You will:
• Be at the forefront of digital transformation in administrative support.
• Develop skills across executive support, workflow automation, and global collaboration.
• Shape the future of how executives are supported — blending the personal touch of an EA with the efficiency of AI and automation.

Joining us is more than saying “yes” to making the world a healthier place. It’s discovering a career that’s challenging, supportive and inspiring. Where a culture driven by excellence helps you not only meet your goals, but also create new ones. We focus on creating a diverse and inclusive culture, encouraging individual expression in the workplace and thrive on the innovative ideas this generates. If this sounds like the workplace for you, apply now! We commit to respond to every applicant.

jobs.title: Senior Executive
jobs.description:
Company Description

Shriram Finance Limited is India's largest retail Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC), offering diverse credit solutions, including commercial vehicle loans, two-wheeler loans, car loans, home loans, gold loans, personal loans, and small business loans. A part of the 50-year-old Shriram Group, Shriram Finance is a trusted name, committed to positively impacting customers' financial well-being. As of September 30, 2024, the company has a robust network of 3,149 branches, a dedicated workforce of over 77,764 employees, and combined Assets Under Management (AUM) of ₹243,042 crores. In November 2022, Shriram Finance was formed through the merger of Shriram Transport Finance Company Limited, Shriram City Union Finance Limited, and Shriram Capital Limited.

Role Description

This is a full-time, on-site Senior Executive role located in Daltonganj. The Senior Executive will oversee day-to-day branch operations, drive business growth strategies, manage customer relationships, and ensure compliance with company policies and standards. Responsibilities include achieving sales targets, monitoring loan disbursement processes, maintaining customer satisfaction, and providing exceptional financial services. Collaboration with team members and leadership to meet organizational objectives is a key aspect of the role.

Qualifications
• Strong knowledge of financial products and services, including loans and credit solutions.
• Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
• Leadership abilities with a capacity to manage teams effectively and foster collaboration.
• Proficiency in data analysis, reporting, and financial decision-making to achieve business targets.
• Prior experience in the financial services or lending industry is preferred.
• Proven customer service and relationship management skills.
• A bachelor's degree in finance, business administration, or a related field is required.
• Willingness to work on-site in Daltonganj and manage local operational activities.

jobs.title: Reservations Executive
jobs.description:
POSITION SUMMARY

Oversee accuracy of room blocks, reservations, and group market codes. Communicate company values and/or culture to new employees. Review and implement new Reservations procedures. Process all reservation requests, changes, and cancellations received by phone, fax, or mail. Identify guest reservation needs and determine appropriate room type. Verify availability of room type and rate. Explain guarantee, special rate, and cancellation policies to callers. Accommodate and document special requests. Answer questions about property facilities/services and room accommodations. Follow sales techniques to maximize revenue. Input and access data in reservation system. Respond to any challenges found for accommodating rooming requests. Set-up proper billing accounts according to Accounting policies. Troubleshoot, resolve, and document guest issues and concerns or escalate/refer to appropriate individual.

Assist management in training, scheduling, counseling, and motivating and coaching employees; serve as a role model and first point of contact of the Guarantee of Fair Treatment/Open Door Policy process. Follow all company policies and procedures; ensure uniform and personal appearance are clean and professional; maintain confidentiality of proprietary information; protect company assets. Welcome and acknowledge all guests according to company standards; anticipate and address guests’ service needs; thank guests with genuine appreciation. Speak with others using clear and professional language; prepare and review written documents accurately and completely; answer telephones using appropriate etiquette. Develop and maintain positive working relationships with others. Comply with quality assurance expectations and standards. Read and visually verify information in a variety of formats. Move, lift, carry, push, pull, and place objects weighing less than or equal to 10 pounds without assistance. Perform other reasonable job duties as requested by Supervisors.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Education: High school diploma or G.E.D. equivalent.

Related Work Experience: At least 2 years of related work experience.

Supervisory Experience: At least 1 year of supervisory experience.

License or Certification: None

jobs.title: B2B Whitepaper Writer + Designer – Executive Hiring Report for Commercial Construction Industry
jobs.description:
Job Description:
We are a national executive recruiting firm specializing in placing senior-level talent (Project Managers, Superintendents, Estimators, and Project Executives) for $200M–$400M commercial general contractors across the U.S.

We are looking to create a highly professional, executive-level industry report titled something along the lines of:

"2026 Commercial Construction Hiring Outlook"
(or similar — open to strategic input)

This will NOT be a sales brochure or generic lead magnet.

This will be a strategic thought-leadership asset designed to:

Position us as an authority in construction hiring

Provide real value to owners, COOs, and VPs of Construction

Support business development conversations

Elevate our brand to a national executive-search level

Scope of Work


We are seeking either:
A B2B whitepaper writer (with ability to coordinate design), OR

A writer + designer team, OR

A marketing consultant who can manage both content and layout


Deliverable:
12–15 page professionally written and designed PDF report

Executive-level tone

Clean, modern, corporate layout (not flashy, not "salesy")

Content Direction (We Will Provide Core Insights)


We will provide:
Industry observations from active searches

Hiring trends we're seeing nationally

Compensation trends and challenges

Time-to-fill data

Candidate behavior insights

Common hiring mistakes among GCs

Our strategic perspective on workforce planning


We need help with:
Structuring the report strategically

Elevating tone to C-suite level

Ensuring it reads like industry insight (not marketing copy)

Designing it to look comparable to a consulting firm or executive search firm publication

Target Audience

Owners

Presidents

COOs

VPs of Construction

Senior leadership at $200M–$400M commercial GCs

This must feel credible and intelligent to experienced construction executives.

Ideal Candidate Experience

Please apply only if you have experience in:
B2B whitepapers or industry reports

Professional services marketing (consulting, executive search, accounting, legal, etc.)

Writing for executive audiences

Corporate report or editorial design (if handling design)

Bonus if you have experience in:
Construction

Executive recruiting

Workforce strategy

Tone We're Looking For

Strategic

Analytical

Insight-driven

Confident but not sales-heavy

Advisory, not promotional

To Apply


Please include:
2–3 examples of whitepapers, executive reports, or similar B2B assets you've created

A brief explanation of how you would approach positioning this for senior construction executives

Whether you handle design in-house or collaborate with a designer

Estimated timeline

Estimated budget range

"Please begin your proposal with the word 'Outlook' so we know you read the full description."

Contract duration of 1 to 3 months. with 30 hours per week.

Mandatory skills:
 White Paper Writing, B2B Marketing, Content Strategy, Professional services marketing, Brand Strategy
